# Zohran Mamdani elected as NYC's first socialist mayor
New York City elected 34-year-old Democratic socialist**[Zohran Mamdani](https://substack.com/redirect/40ea7116-3d8d-40b7-9e33-1e70d16966be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** as its next mayor Tuesday, making him the **[first Muslim](https://substack.com/redirect/98148629-2b4d-489c-8371-6c687289ac68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and youngest leader of the nation's largest city as he defeated former Governor Andrew Cuomo.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f287d2bd-f8fe-447a-9acc-e4c7296c8e96?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Mamdani delivered a victory speech** from Brooklyn's Paramount Theatre quoting socialist figures Eugene Debs and Jawaharlal Nehru while declaring victory over a political dynasty.
* **Trump labeled him a "100% Communist Lunatic"** and threatened to cut federal funds, though Mamdani challenged Trump saying "to get any of us, you will have to get through all of us."
* **Mamdani pledged** to freeze rent for two million New Yorkers, make buses free, provide universal childcare, and create a Department of Community Safety to replace police on mental health calls.
* **His campaign trail was littered** with criticism over Israel positions including refusing to condemn "globalize the intifada" and calling Gaza a genocide, but built his campaign through TikTok and Instagram with celebrity cameos, centering his message on affordability that connected to young voters. He enters City Hall in 58 days.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/89bfd2db-68ed-4645-9e18-5daf305888e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/89bfd2db-68ed-4645-9e18-5daf305888e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Virginia Democrat wins governor's race despite supporting political violence
Democrat **[Abigail Spanberger](https://substack.com/redirect/b40bdff4-aba9-4831-bbbb-f1b06122b975?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/b40bdff4-aba9-4831-bbbb-f1b06122b975?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)defeated Republican Winsome Earle-Sears to become Virginia's first female governor Tuesday, capitalizing on President Donald Trump's deep unpopularity in the state.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d0d7feb5-39e2-49c2-910a-999a46ff9f3a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Spanberger exceeded** Vice President Kamala Harris's six-point 2024 presidential margin in Virginia as close to six in ten voters disapproved of Trump's job performance, with two-thirds of Spanberger supporters saying their vote was only to oppose the president.
* **The former congresswoman** dominated among Black voters by a nine-to-one margin despite Earle-Sears being poised to become the first Black woman governor of any state, while also benefiting from a historic 34-point gender gap with 65% of women backing her versus only 48% of men.
* **[Economy ranked as the top issue](https://substack.com/redirect/b40bdff4-aba9-4831-bbbb-f1b06122b975?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/b40bdff4-aba9-4831-bbbb-f1b06122b975?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)for nearly half of voters who broke significantly for Spanberger, as she focused her campaign on how Trump administration efforts to upend government were harming Virginia families, while healthcare concerns from the government shutdown also drove overwhelming support her way.
* **She faced fierce criticism** for continuing to support general candidate Jay Jones, who sent texts **[calling for the murder of Republican House Speaker](https://substack.com/redirect/b40bdff4-aba9-4831-bbbb-f1b06122b975?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Todd Gilbert and his children.

* * *
# Dick Cheney dead at 84
Former Vice President Dick Cheney **[died Monday night](https://substack.com/redirect/49541e77-9389-47df-82cc-a303f97cdc00?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** at age 84 from complications related to pneumonia and heart disease.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/49541e77-9389-47df-82cc-a303f97cdc00?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Cheney passed away** with his wife of 61 years, Lynne, and daughters Liz and Mary at his side, ending a decades-long public service career that included serving as White House chief of staff under Gerald Ford, six terms as Wyoming's congressman, Defense Secretary under George H.W. Bush, and two terms as vice president from 2001 to 2009.
* **The Wyoming native** was known as a force behind America's response to the September 11 terrorist attacks, championing the wars in Iraq and Afghanistan.
* **Cheney had endured** significant health struggles throughout his life, suffering multiple heart attacks over the years before receiving a heart transplant in March.
* **Former President Bush** mourned Cheney as a decent and honorable man who was the running mate he needed in 2000, while other political figures including former Presidents Bill Clinton and Mike Pence, former Secretary of State Condoleezza Rice, and various lawmakers paid tribute to his dedication to public.
* * *

# Democrats reject government reopening for 14th time in longest shutdown in history
Senate Democrats on Tuesday **[rejected Republicans' 14th attempt](https://substack.com/redirect/e869f2da-df84-405b-8497-3208b34a39d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to end the government shutdown, guaranteeing it will become the longest in U.S. history as the standoff enters its 36th day.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e869f2da-df84-405b-8497-3208b34a39d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer and his caucus** maintained their demand for a concrete agreement on healthcare subsidies before voting to reopen, blaming Republicans for lacking a healthcare plan as Americans received notices of increased premiums over the weekend, though nearly a dozen Democrats met privately Monday to explore potential exit strategies from the impasse.
* **Bipartisan discussions** have centered on extending the current continuing resolution beyond its November 21 deadline into December or January to allow time for spending bills and avoid reopening only to shut down again weeks later, with Alaska Sen. Lisa Murkowski proposing a two-year subsidy extension and other lawmakers considering adjustments to income caps and premium contribution levels despite the challenge that insurers already released rates for open enrollment.
* **Senate Majority Leader John Thune** expressed cautious optimism about reaching an agreement soon while acknowledging significant cross-pressures on lawmakers, and Republicans have offered Democrats guaranteed votes on healthcare legislation after the government reopens.
* **President Donald Trump** has refused to meet with Democratic leaders until the government reopens and urged Senate Republicans to eliminate the 60-vote filibuster threshold over the weekend, frustrating Democrats like New Jersey Sen. Andy Kim who argue no deal can succeed without his direct involvement.

* * *
# MTG shocks nation during appearance on The View
Georgia Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene surprised hosts and viewers during her Tuesday **[appearance on"The View"](https://substack.com/redirect/d7a64e22-c9ed-4949-afdf-afceba9689ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** by disagreeing with President Donald Trump on multiple policy issues and calling for bipartisan female unity in an unexpectedly cordial interview.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ba52ef0d-3a03-457b-8c3e-d3d6a225e9ac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Greene contradicted Trump 's** endorsement in New York City's mayoral race by backing Republican Curtis Sliwa over independent Andrew Cuomo, citing allegations against the former governor and his nursing home COVID policies as disqualifying factors.
* **The conservative powerhouse** aligned with congressional Democrats against Trump's wishes by demanding release of Jeffrey Epstein investigation files, criticizing unnamed powerful men being shielded and expressing concern about teenage sexual abuse victims.
* **Greene chastised Republican House Speaker** Mike Johnson and GOP leadership for failing to extend Affordable Care Act insurance subsidies before their December 31 expiration, a stance that puts her at odds with her party amid the ongoing government shutdown triggered by Senate Democrats.

* * *

We believe every Tennessee child deserves an opportunity to succeed—not just survive. That means fully funded schools, support for educators, and a government that backs public education instead of attacking it.

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Congress must stand up for federal workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Let's be clear, Team: Federal workers didn't cause this shutdown. Federal workers are at their desks, right now, working without pay. Federal workers chose jobs that serve our country. At bare minimum, they deserve to be paid for their time, their commitment, and their role making our democracy work. Their paychecks should never be a political football, all while Congress and the president get paid.
Send your letter right now so that Congress knows the American people support our brave federal workers and demand they all get paid as they deserve when this shutdown is over >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/pay-furloughed-workers-the-money-they-deserve?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/pay-furloughed-workers-the-money-they-deserve?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Folks,
We can't believe it either, but President Trump announced furloughed federal workers may never get the paychecks they lost during his shutdown. He thinks some “don’t deserve” it. That’s right — the people who inspect our food, care for veterans, and protect our national parks are being told they might never be paid for weeks of missed work. It’s cruel, it’s unprecedented, and it’s wrong.
Congress has the power to fix this right now by passing emergency legislation guaranteeing every furloughed worker full back pay — no exceptions, no excuses. Every previous Congress has made workers whole once the government reopened. But now Trump is breaking that promise — using everyday workers as political pawns.
Experts told ABC News this move is “ punitive and unprecedented .” And they’re right. Families have missed rent, drained savings, and lined up at food banks — all because of political games from a billionaire president who’s never had to worry about a paycheck. We can’t let Trump get away with this attack on working people.
Send a letter today and demand Congress act immediately to pay furloughed workers the paychecks they’ve earned and deserve >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/pay-furloughed-workers-the-money-they-deserve?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/pay-furloughed-workers-the-money-they-deserve?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=110525_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=110525_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=6spCbcCoXaqhPz78eIFJf1olrciwKjtOGTzAM3FMfmBW7Y6goYfb9jhwIToe5KK3ZlfKpTJ7Z2GaAihHJzYRu%2BLqGoNZu3p%2FDibcgmP2KGg%2FygSUPlct9ZMJzTW4KZ1Yv985k%2BT6wfDyu7lPwo2mglwXUS2DzwrrkucGMMeJ6A0J%2F8w%2FPGU%2FUfRB6GOqLYv%2BqTUzrcUHnFsloPUHy5W3CAe5RH8V2OTzw1%2Fa%2FO6HB0KazY3xLAaRM8KLUDz2gfMJG8XJ8IV6N41%2FaSOHo07ZTrICfSCMKx0EYBToAdmwJ%2B4g3qzxPb%2FTDZIH2H5FiwPjhi5YSMcy7J3tcAn9pkOVGDSyiqr2pw%2FezvhhKnFbDq9yNi08PWIcxBbEdfmbj4hSV0TN6Q2kcIfTEKCLhpixu5zS3hEaw0A%2F2KLRAFcYuPU%3D .

name: Team Kelly Ayotte Press
subject: Governor Ayotte Invites NYC Businesses to Relocate to New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kelly for New Hampshire, Chris Connelly Treasurer, PO Box 4723 Manchester, NH 03108
body:
The Governor’s campaign is running ads in Manhattan today to share her invitation.

| | | | | [|
---](https://kellyfornh.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b706db8cb07a975cbe2ecb8b7&id=e797c5167b&e=38cb9f3df0)
| | | | | | **Governor Ayotte Invites NYC Businesses to Relocate to New Hampshire**
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:** November 5, 2025
**CONTACT:** John Corbett, [press@kellyfornh.com](mailto:press@kellyfornh.com?subject=&body=)
**NASHUA, N.H. —** Following the election of Zohran Mamdani as Mayor of New York City, Governor Kelly Ayotte today invited businesses in the Big Apple looking to flee higher taxes and government red tape to move to New Hampshire. The Governor’s campaign is running ads in Manhattan today to share her invitation.
---
|
---
| | **Announcing the campaign, Governor Ayotte said,** “My message to business owners in New York City is this: Come to New Hampshire. We’ll help your business make the switch, and you’ll keep more of your hard-earned money!”
**Ayotte campaign spokesman John Corbett added,** “New York can experiment with socialism — New Hampshire will stick with lower taxes and more freedom with Governor Ayotte in the corner office. Anyone seeking freedom from Mamdani’s disastrous policies is welcome to join us in the Granite State.”
Under Governor Ayotte’s leadership, New Hampshire is the #1 state in the nation for economic opportunity, taxpayer return on investment, child wellbeing, and public safety, and has been recognized as the most competitive tax structure in the Northeast.
The following ads are running in New York City today:
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | ###
---
| | Paid for by Kelly for New Hampshire, Chris Connelly Treasurer, PO Box 4723 Manchester, NH 03108
---

name: GOP Presidential
subject: What was Eisenhower's toughest decision
body:
We believe the best way to prepare young people for complex challenges is to show them how great Americans faced them before.

| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0beobj8a1pqv9j9e7s3c7ii2i9ddnosl4f4lo10_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cpjm6ob6chh2bs)
---
Friend, At 4:15 a.m. on June 5, 1944, **General Dwight D. Eisenhower** faced the most difficult decision of his life: whether to send **156,000 Allied troops** into a **full-scale invasion** of Nazi-occupied France. The weather was treacherous and the risk enormous - and the responsibility rested solely on Eisenhower's shoulders. After giving the go-ahead, Eisenhower quietly wrote a note taking full responsibility in case the mission failed: **_" If any blame or fault attaches to the attempt, it is mine alone."_** He also wrote that, _in the event of success, he would give full credit to the soldiers on the ground_. That handwritten message, never released, never needed, shows what real leadership looks like. Eisenhower wasn't simply commanding an army. He was embodying the kind of integrity and humility we rarely see today. With the full knowledge that success or failure rested in his hands, Eisenhower trusted his judgement and made the decision to proceed. This powerful moment is the centerpiece of our new video lesson: **" General Dwight D. Eisenhower: D-Day and Responsibility."** We believe the best way to prepare young people for complex challenges is to show them how great Americans faced them before. **Will you contribute today to help us continue this work and gain special access to our "General Dwight D. Eisenhower: D-Day and Responsibility" class?** Your support ensures these powerful historical lessons reach students nationwide, shaping informed and principled citizens. The video is free to watch, but as a **special thank you for your support** , we're offering donors access to the free exclusive lesson. Your contribution helps us equip teachers, administrators, and homeschoolers across the nation with stories like this. Stories that use America's proud history to teach the next generation of Americans courage, humility, and leadership. **_Please take just :30s and donate whatever you can right now. It is absolutely critical that every student in America has access to material like this_. ** [**https://secure.anedot.com/bill-of-rights-institute/dday-aug2025**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7vttaktjh60cbs01f8l28j0ic3kqah0lu85h0o8_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cpjm6ob6chh2bs) **And remember if you donate today, you immediately receive access to the video.** Eisenhower's story shows what it means to lead with integrity, even when the stakes are life or death. His decision changed history and his legacy can change how we think about responsibility in our own lives. **Your investment in civic education will help students understand the importance of personal responsibility.** Thank you, Bill of Rights Institute | [** Contribute Now >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrqtl0i999p2mhfgfotb68cbbu25arec9v0nq9tg_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cpjm6ob6chh2bs)

subject: 🚨ALERT: Mamdani Victory Marks the Socialist Turn of a Party Losing Touch with America
body:

Dear Peter,

We thought you may be interested to receive this breaking news alert.

Illinois Review is the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump.
http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fe08576ca4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fe08576ca4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)

Mamdani Victory Marks the Socialist Turn of a Party Losing Touch with America (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/11/mamdani-victory-marks-the-socialist-turn-of-a-party-losing-touch-with-america.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fe08576ca4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/11/mamdani-victory-marks-the-socialist-turn-of-a-party-losing-touch-with-america.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fe08576ca4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
New York City Mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani celebrates during an election night event at the Brooklyn Paramount Theater in New York's Brooklyn borough on Tuesday. (Angelina Katsanis/AFP/Getty Images)
By Illinois Review

The Democratic Party has a new face – and it’s one that should terrify every voter who still believes in law, order, and common sense. On Tuesday night, socialist Assemblyman Zohran Mamdani – a proud member of the Democratic Socialists of America (DSA) – claimed victory in New York City’s mayoral race, a stunning development that cements the party’s far-left drift.

But even before the confetti hit the floor, alarm bells were ringing among Democrats themselves. In a scathing memo released Wednesday morning, by Third Way, the prominent center-left think tank warned that Mamdani’s rise could be disastrous for Democrats nationwide.

“We therefore urge Democrats at all levels to resist the pressure to align with Mamdani’s politics and agenda,” the memo stated plainly – an extraordinary rebuke from within the party’s own ranks.

The memo lays out what it calls “ten key points” explaining why Mamdani’s radical brand of socialism is political poison outside of New York’s leftist bubble. Among the most striking data: Mamdani underperformed Vice President Kamala Harris by 18 points in heavily Democratic New York City, winning only 50 percent of the vote compared to Harris’ 68 percent.

“If the Mamdani brand of politics can’t overperform in a place like New York,” the memo concludes, “it certainly won’t work in the far more conservative battleground areas.”

Even more damning is the think tank’s breakdown of the DSA platform itself – which reads more like a revolutionary manifesto than a governing agenda. It calls for the abolition of prisons, the disarming of law enforcement officers, the nationalization of businesses, and even the elimination of the U.S. Senate.

To ordinary voters – including millions of traditional Democrats – these ideas are extreme, dangerous, and disconnected from reality.

“The DSA platform is a Republican ad maker’s dream,” the memo admits.

And indeed, Republicans are already seizing on Mamdani’s victory, calling him “the single most effective foil” they could ask for heading into 2026.

The warning signs are clear: Democrats are gambling with their future by embracing a socialist standard-bearer whose policies alienate the very voters they need to win back Congress and the White House.

For years, party leaders like Barack Obama and Bill Clinton warned against allowing the far-left fringe to take control. But that’s exactly what’s happening now. From defunding the police to opening the borders and emptying prisons, today’s Democratic Party is increasingly defined by policies that prioritize ideology over safety, and politics over people.

And while Mamdani’s supporters may celebrate his “movement victory,” the reality is that socialism doesn’t sell in Peoria, Pittsburgh, or Phoenix. Working families – including many lifelong Democrats – are watching their party abandon them for activists who see capitalism as the enemy and criminals as the victims.

In the end, Mamdani’s win might not be a triumph for progressives – but a gift for conservatives. By embracing socialism, Democrats have given Republicans exactly what they wanted: a clear contrast between freedom and control, order and chaos, America and the radical left.

As the think tank memo put it bluntly, “Democrats who align with Mamdani’s agenda will fail in tough races.”

The question now is whether the party will listen – or double down on the same far-left ideology that could cost them the country.

name: Defenders of Wildlife
subject: What is the mighty right whale?
body:
This marine marvel is quite a sight
This marine marvel is quite a sight
| [](https://support.defenders.org/s/4171644/38SyG9Xl)
---
| | |
---
#
|
---
[](https://support.defenders.org/s/4171645/38SyG9Xl)
---
| | |
---
## _Let’s make things right for right whales!_
* * *
|
---
| | |
---
#
#### **_Which whale is the right whale?_**
To the keen-eyed wave watcher, the sight of a V-shaped plume of mist signifies one thing: the blowhole of a surfacing right whale! These behemoths can weigh up to 70 tons, at almost 50 feet in length – that’s a lot of whale!
#
Their dark blue-gray skin and lack of dorsal fin can make them tricky to spot, but their large heads with rough, white patches called callosities give them away. If you see what looks like a bumpy humpback, it may actually be a right whale!
#
|
---
| | |
---
#
#### **_Where do they live?_**
Today, North Atlantic right whales live and migrate along the Atlantic coast, from their northern feeding waters in Canada and New England to their calving grounds in the warm waters of the Carolinas, Georgia and Florida. They feed on vast quantities of plankton by straining water through their baleen plates.
#
Once, the Atlantic was populated by tens of thousands of North Atlantic right whales. But these whales are now critically endangered, with only about 370 individuals left – and fewer than 70 female whales who can still have calves.
#
|
---
| | |
---
#
#### **_What’s been happening?_**
Right whales have had a tough journey: Centuries of whaling eliminated the species from its eastern North Atlantic range. By the end of the nineteenth century, these populations of right whales were nearly extinct. An international ban on hunting right whales finally came into force in 1935, when there were probably fewer than 100 surviving right whales.
#
Although no one hunts right whales anymore, humans are still the leading cause of right whale deaths. Vessel strikes and entanglements in fishing gear are the deadliest threats. With whale deaths outpacing births, we’re running out of time make things right for right whales!
#
|
---
| | |
---
#
#### **_How can we help?_**
With the support of our members, Defenders advocates for seasonal slowdowns in right whale calving grounds to protect right whales, especially vulnerable mother whales and calves. If you live along the Atlantic Coast or plan on visiting, you may be able to help with efforts to track and protect right whales! You can look into volunteer programs that report coastal whale sightings. And wherever you live, you can tell your family and friends about how these whales need our help!
#
|
---
| | |
---
#
**Check out our blog to see when and where North Atlantic right whales can be spotted!**
#
|
---
[How to Watch for Right Whales!](https://support.defenders.org/s/4171646/38SyG9Xl)
---
| | |
---
#
|
---
|
---

clean_body: This marine marvel is quite a sight This marine marvel is quite a sight | | | | | | | | Let’s make things right for right whales! | | | | Which whale is the right whale? To the keen-eyed wave watcher, the sight of a V-shaped plume of mist signifies one thing: the blowhole of a surfacing right whale! These behemoths can weigh up to 70 tons, at almost 50 feet in length – that’s a lot of whale! Their dark blue-gray skin and lack of dorsal fin can make them tricky to spot, but their large heads with rough, white patches called callosities give them away. If you see what looks like a bumpy humpback, it may actually be a right whale! | | | | Where do they live? Today, North Atlantic right whales live and migrate along the Atlantic coast, from their northern feeding waters in Canada and New England to their calving grounds in the warm waters of the Carolinas, Georgia and Florida. They feed on vast quantities of plankton by straining water through their baleen plates. Once, the Atlantic was populated by tens of thousands of North Atlantic right whales. But these whales are now critically endangered, with only about 370 individuals left – and fewer than 70 female whales who can still have calves. | | | | What’s been happening? Right whales have had a tough journey: Centuries of whaling eliminated the species from its eastern North Atlantic range. By the end of the nineteenth century, these populations of right whales were nearly extinct. An international ban on hunting right whales finally came into force in 1935, when there were probably fewer than 100 surviving right whales. Although no one hunts right whales anymore, humans are still the leading cause of right whale deaths. Vessel strikes and entanglements in fishing gear are the deadliest threats. With whale deaths outpacing births, we’re running out of time make things right for right whales! | | | | How can we help? With the support of our members, Defenders advocates for seasonal slowdowns in right whale calving grounds to protect right whales, especially vulnerable mother whales and calves. If you live along the Atlantic Coast or plan on visiting, you may be able to help with efforts to track and protect right whales! You can look into volunteer programs that report coastal whale sightings. And wherever you live, you can tell your family and friends about how these whales need our help! | | | | Check out our blog to see when and where North Atlantic right whales can be spotted! | | | | | | | Defenders of Wildlife 1130 17th Street NW • Washington, DC 20036 Photo Credit: North Atlantic Right Whale © Moira Brown/wikiCommons

subject: Tempe Officers Association Endorses Karrin Taylor Robson for Governor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KARRIN FOR ARIZONA
body:
Law Enforcement Groups Resoundingly Support KTR for Governor

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/karrinforarizona/tempe-officers?e=ebfb0fda52)
---
[|
---](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=f85ca1459e&e=ebfb0fda52)
| | | | | |
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** November 5th, 2025

**Tempe Officers Association Endorses Karrin Taylor Robson for Governor** _Law Enforcement Groups Resoundingly Support KTR for Governor_
**PHOENIX, AZ** — Karrin Taylor Robson, the Trump-endorsed conservative business executive running for Governor of Arizona, today announced an endorsement from the Tempe Officers Association, citing her steadfast support for law enforcement and commitment to keeping Arizona’s communities safe.
“Our members deeply value Karrin Taylor Robson’s steadfast support for law enforcement and her genuine understanding of both the risks we take and the sacrifices our families endure,” said **Rob Ferraro, President of the Tempe Officers Association**. “We have full confidence that Karrin will be a strong voice for public safety as Arizona’s next Governor, and we urge our fellow Arizonans to join the Tempe Officers Association in supporting her campaign in 2026.”
Taylor Robson thanked the Association for its endorsement and reaffirmed her commitment to standing with Arizona’s law enforcement officers.
“I am honored to have the support of the men and women of the Tempe Officers Association,” said **Karrin Taylor Robson.** “Every day, our officers put their lives on the line to protect our families and our communities. As Governor, I will always back the blue, hold criminals accountable, and make sure law enforcement has the tools, training, and respect they deserve.”
---
|
---
| |
Karrin Taylor Robson’s campaign continues to build a broad, America-first coalition that spans national, state, and local leaders, as well as law enforcement and military supporters:

* **National Endorsements:** President Donald J. Trump, Governor Sarah Huckabee Sanders, Senator Pete Ricketts, Speaker Newt Gingrich, and Rob Schneider.
* **State Leaders:** Senator Tim Dunn, Senator Janae Shamp, House Majority Leader Michael Carbone, Representative Walt Blackman, Representative Selina Bliss, Representative David Livingston, Representative Teresa Martinez, Representative Justin Wilmeth.
* **Local Officials:** Mayor Stephanie Irwin (Pinetop-Lakeside), Mayor Doug Nicholls (Yuma), Mayor Eric Orsborn (Buckeye), Mayor Julia Wheatley (Queen Creek), Mayor Chip Wilson (Apache Junction)
* **Law Enforcement & Military: **Combined Law Enforcement Association of Arizona, Tucson Police Officers Association, Nogales Police Officers Association, Tempe Police Officers Association; Gen. Michael T. Moseley (USAF, Ret.), Gen. Robin Rand (USAF, Ret.), Lt. Gen. Richard Newton (USAF, Ret.), Lt. Gen. John Regni (USAF, Ret.), Maj. Gen. A. Bowen Ballard (USAF, Ret.), Lt. Col. Rusty Mitchell (USAF, Ret.).

---
| |
**About Karrin Taylor Robson** Karrin Taylor Robson is a lifelong conservative, business leader, and mother running for Governor of Arizona with President Trump’s endorsement.
Just like President Trump, Karrin is not a politician; she is a self-made business executive who has built one of the state’s leading land-use and economic development firms. Her work has helped bring jobs, opportunity, and growth to Arizona while cutting through bureaucracy and fighting government overreach. She’s also served on key military and education boards that impact Arizona families every day, including for more than 20 years on the Air Force Chief of Staff’s Civic Leaders Group.
A proud wife, mother of four, and grandmother, Karrin is running for Governor to keep our communities safe, fix, root out waste, fraud, and abuse in Arizona, and she will always have President Trump's back.
---
|
---

name: GOP Presidential
subject: What was Eisenhower's toughest decision
body:
We believe the best way to prepare young people for complex challenges is to show them how great Americans faced them before.

| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6uqej0pt0n8ksaf27n04i1j8p6gcfnmqch5bpf8_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cpjm6ob6c5h2bs)
---
Friend, At 4:15 a.m. on June 5, 1944, **General Dwight D. Eisenhower** faced the most difficult decision of his life: whether to send **156,000 Allied troops** into a **full-scale invasion** of Nazi-occupied France. The weather was treacherous and the risk enormous - and the responsibility rested solely on Eisenhower's shoulders. After giving the go-ahead, Eisenhower quietly wrote a note taking full responsibility in case the mission failed: **_" If any blame or fault attaches to the attempt, it is mine alone."_** He also wrote that, _in the event of success, he would give full credit to the soldiers on the ground_. That handwritten message, never released, never needed, shows what real leadership looks like. Eisenhower wasn't simply commanding an army. He was embodying the kind of integrity and humility we rarely see today. With the full knowledge that success or failure rested in his hands, Eisenhower trusted his judgement and made the decision to proceed. This powerful moment is the centerpiece of our new video lesson: **" General Dwight D. Eisenhower: D-Day and Responsibility."** We believe the best way to prepare young people for complex challenges is to show them how great Americans faced them before. **Will you contribute today to help us continue this work and gain special access to our "General Dwight D. Eisenhower: D-Day and Responsibility" class?** Your support ensures these powerful historical lessons reach students nationwide, shaping informed and principled citizens. The video is free to watch, but as a **special thank you for your support** , we're offering donors access to the free exclusive lesson. Your contribution helps us equip teachers, administrators, and homeschoolers across the nation with stories like this. Stories that use America's proud history to teach the next generation of Americans courage, humility, and leadership. **_Please take just :30s and donate whatever you can right now. It is absolutely critical that every student in America has access to material like this_. ** [**https://secure.anedot.com/bill-of-rights-institute/dday-aug2025**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z37i9vltg1s6dc1stl9vpdjntdc6e01tbvnrq2d0_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cpjm6ob6c5h2bs) **And remember if you donate today, you immediately receive access to the video.** Eisenhower's story shows what it means to lead with integrity, even when the stakes are life or death. His decision changed history and his legacy can change how we think about responsibility in our own lives. **Your investment in civic education will help students understand the importance of personal responsibility.** Thank you, Bill of Rights Institute | [** Contribute Now >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1fvusiqip4tmdcu42pq7qcjnpknn3m9rhosml68_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cpjm6ob6c5h2bs)

Let me introduce you to Zohran Mamdani, the new SOCIALIST mayor of New York City. Charlie had Mamdani pegged from Day 1. He knew that, despite his attempts to portray himself as a modern Western man, Mamdani was nothing more than a dangerous radical, hell-bent on devastating New York City with policies straight out of The Communist Manifesto. A self-declared socialist, Mamdani wants to “globalize the intifada” and import values into the West that will destroy New York City and destabilize our civilization. Everything about him runs counter to America First. The fact that he WON in arguably America's greatest city proves that, while we won Congress and the White House,the fight for the heart, soul, and future of America still rages on. Turning Point PAC is working harder than ever to . We’re carrying on Charlie’s fight to ensure that radical socialists like Mamdani do NOT gain power in other cities, counties, and states across the country. name: Jordan Zaslow
subject: *CORRECTION* Our win rate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118713473/580650364/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_251105Results_JZ_10_90DO_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhODQzZjQ4LTYzYmEtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTAwMjI0ODI0ZTA4ZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jbuE9ASPSPXxSWYAuFdXryleaj15F742bLaovpo6X6s=)
---
Peter,

I am so deeply moved and, honestly, emotional to be writing this email.

Her Bold Move has been doing this work, supporting underserved women candidates since 2020. Last week, we sent you one of the most exciting emails we’ve ever sent, announcing our win rate for 2025 as it stood at the time: 97.5%.

As past General Election Nights taught us, “win rates” for orgs like ours tend to fall in November. After all, our candidates were up against incredibly well-funded, Trump-endorsed, anti-choice, often independently wealthy opponents – and they were often running for seats that had never been held by a woman before in history.

[**Yesterday, nearly EVERY. SINGLE. ONE. of the candidates on the Her Bold Move roster (and we’ve added a few since the primaries) WON their races or received enough votes to qualify for a runoff.

**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118713474/580650365/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_251105Results_JZ_10_90DO_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhODQzZjQ4LTYzYmEtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTAwMjI0ODI0ZTA4ZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jbuE9ASPSPXxSWYAuFdXryleaj15F742bLaovpo6X6s=)**That means HER BOLD MOVE’s new win rate is 98%.**

We want to take a moment to level set: our candidates were up against incredibly challenging odds. These were not classic “blue” candidates in “blue” districts. Many of these candidates were underfunded, underserved, underresourced – classic underdogs. For some of these candidates, Her Bold Move was their only national endorsement. For others, HBM was the only support they could count on.

**Our win rate serves as proof that the programs we’ve built at Her Bold Move, programs which we’ve specifically designed to support _women_ candidates running in the _toughest races in the country,_ [**are working.**

Her Bold Move is successfully CHANGING THE OUTCOMES of elections in the parts of the country where women need representation MOST. We are just getting started, and we would be honored to have you join us in this work: We depend on supporters like you to make this work possible. You can help us continue to shatter glass ceilings by rushing $20.26 or more today. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118713475/580650366/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_251105Results_JZ_10_90DO_NG_N_L2&amount=20.26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhODQzZjQ4LTYzYmEtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTAwMjI0ODI0ZTA4ZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jbuE9ASPSPXxSWYAuFdXryleaj15F742bLaovpo6X6s=)

Our team is looking forward to sharing more information in the coming days with the details of our candidates’ victories. In the meantime, I’m sending an ENORMOUS congratulations to each and every one of our phenomenal candidates. It was our honor to support you.

The future is brighter with these women in the halls of power,

Jordan Zaslow
President & Founder
Her Bold Move

\----------- Forwarded message ---------
---
Peter,

Many of you have written to us that you feel a sense of despair when you think about the future of American politics. So much corruption. So much awful policy. Where are the “adults in the room” or the “leaders with integrity”....

But here is some much-needed GREAT and ENCOURAGING news: Over the past 12 months, Her Bold Move has supported around 40 candidates in primaries and special elections ACROSS AMERICA.

In 12 months, **only 1 candidate** from the entire Her Bold Move roster **has _lost_ a race.** That means we’ve won more than 97% of the races we’ve been involved with since Election Day 2024.

Here’s the thing: “Win rate” often comes with different implications – and it can be used to pressure orgs to support candidates who already had a high likelihood of winning based on fundraising numbers, incumbency advantage, or the political leaning of their district.

But at Her Bold Move, we see it as proof that our programs, **_specifically designed to support women candidates running in the _toughest_ _races_ in the country –_** are working.

[**Her Bold Move has repeatedly changed the outcomes of elections. We support candidates running for seats in majority male rooms and/or in states with abortion bans. In many cases, we’re our candidates’ only national endorsement – but we still help them beat the odds AND WIN! You can be a part of this uniquely impactful movement for women by rushing $20.25 RIGHT NOW. Let’s keep up this incredible momentum before Election Day 2025 – happening THIS TUESDAY!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118713476/580650367/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_251105Results_JZ_10_90DO_NG_N_L3&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhODQzZjQ4LTYzYmEtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTAwMjI0ODI0ZTA4ZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jbuE9ASPSPXxSWYAuFdXryleaj15F742bLaovpo6X6s=)

---
**It's been over a month** since voters in Southern Arizona overwhelmingly elected me in a special election to represent them in Congress. We won by 40 points. The results have been certified. The people have spoken and they deserve representation.
This obstruction isn't just about politics. It's about a Speaker who's silencing an entire district because he doesn't like that my election threatens his razor-thin majority. It's an abuse of power that strikes at the foundation of our democracy and sets a dangerous precedent.
If that power is allowed to stand, any Speaker could override the will of the people and deny voters representation for months at a time.
**This is a defining moment — not just for our district, but for our democracy. Every dollar we raise fuels this fight to hold Speaker Johnson accountable.**
[**Please, split a $20 donation right now between AZ Dems and my campaign to help us defend democracy and end this obstruction once and for all.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118713694/580650997/1165928570?amount=20&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_VIP_AC_20251105_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmU4ZWRmOTctNjNiYS1mMDExLThlNjEtMDAyMjQ4MjRlMDhkIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uIUHNTAhAKbOfMwNsqh5k5WDRG5JlmMx1b2OtlSGWOg=)

name: Leslie Mehta
subject: We did it!
disclaimer_text:
Paid For By
Leslie Mehta for Delegate
body:
Hi Peter,

We did it.

Because of you — every door knocked, every call made, every dollar given — we won this race.

This victory isn’t about one person or one campaign. It’s about all of us who believe Virginia can lead with compassion, fairness, and common sense.

Thank you for believing in me and in the promise of what’s possible when we come together. I’m so proud to represent our community in the House of Delegates — and I promise to fight for you every single day.

But the real work starts now, so let’s keep going!

With endless gratitude,

Leslie
Delegate-elect, District 73

https://www.facebook.com/leslie4delegate/ [https://www.facebook.com/leslie4delegate/]
https://www.instagram.com/leslie4delegate [https://www.instagram.com/leslie4delegate]
https://twitter.com/lesliemehtava [https://twitter.com/lesliemehtava]

Paid For By
Leslie Mehta for Delegate
PO Box 1721
Midlothian, VA 23113
United States

It’s about all of us who believe Virginia can lead with compassion, fairness, and common sense. Thank you for believing in me and in the promise of what’s possible when we come together. With endless gratitude, Leslie Delegate-elect, District 73 [] [] [] Paid For By Leslie Mehta for Delegate PO Box 1721 Midlothian, VA 23113 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . You can also click here to donate [] .

In a new article, _[Roll Call](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=307f818744&e=659fba240e)_ released its list of the top 10 most vulnerable House seats in 2026 and Arizona's 6th Congressional District is on it.

We've built incredible momentum together –
✅ We FLIPPED this seat in 2022.
✅ We GREW our margin in 2024.
✅ We’ve built a $2.3 MILLION war chest. But now, the left is coming for us harder than ever before and we need your help. They're already flooding battlegrounds like ours with outside money, national operatives, and attack ads. They’ve made it clear: **AZ-06 is one of their top targets.** We need your help to keep AZ-06 RED, defend the House majority, and continue delivering results for Arizona.

Peter, Last night, Democrats across the country notched impressive victories in critical races. Together, Americans showed this administration that they want change that improves our economy and lowers costs for families. **[You can make the impact even bigger in Indiana by rushing a donation to our state party today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118714460/580653219/1764064610?refcode=251105night&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzZkMDUzOS02NWJhLWYwMTEtOGU2MS0wMDIyNDgyNGUwOGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NtPY83NuDtJ0MTYM30rnwKnnloHKee0_R3W2A1mKSxs=)** Democrats flipped the Governor’s race in Virginia, won the governorship in New Jersey, won citywide in New York City, broke the State Senate supermajority in Mississippi, flipped two statewide public service commission positions in Georgia, and defeated JD Vance’s brother to keep the mayor’s office in Cincinnati. name: Lizzie Fletcher
subject: A very good night!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
Last night was a very good night—for Democrats and for everyone who believes in the power of people coming together to make progress.
In Virginia, Abigail Spanberger flipped the governor’s seat blue—making history as the first woman ever to lead the commonwealth. In New Jersey, Mikie Sherrill won the governor’s race, maintaining Democratic control of the seat a year after the state showed signs of shifting toward President Donald Trump. And out in California, voters said yes to Proposition 50 and stood up against the partisan redistricting effort in Texas and in states across the country.
The big takeaway? We can do it .
When we organize, when we show up, and when we work together, we win. That’s what Democrats did across the country last night. And they did it in different ways, with different campaigns, demonstrating the depth and breadth of the Democratic coalition—and also demonstrating that Democrats care about people and are showing up for them everywhere. And that’s exactly how we’ll keep building our coalition, in Texas and across the country.
None of this would have been possible without the incredible volunteers and supporters who made calls, knocked on doors, donated, and lifted each other up. And, even though I wasn’t on the ballot this time, #TeamLizzie was all over this election. Our team volunteered on these winning campaigns and more. We fought back against Texas redistricting and showed the rest of the country the urgency of meeting the moment.
We have a lot to be proud of. And a lot of work to do. Your commitment and energy power is what will carry us to victory in 2026 and beyond—not just this campaign, but this effort to take back the House and to move our country forward to a better future for all Americans.
Now let’s keep that momentum going. We’ve seen what’s possible—and together, we can do it again.
Make a contribution today to help us build on this momentum and win in 2026. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folfe251105?refcode=folfe251105]
Together we can do anything,
Lizzie Signature [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folfe251105?refcode=folfe251105]

VOLUNTEER [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Ln8e8kjn2Euuh3daVlmozQ2]
3262 Westheimer, PMB 636, Houston, TX 77098
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS

name: John Fetterman
subject: hell yeah
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?t=1&akid=10411%2E434096%2ENwsjV9)
| | |
---
Derek, this is the kind of email I _love_ to write. Last night, folks showed up and showed out.
Let’s celebrate what we pulled off:
🎉 **Our three Supreme Court judges were retained** – which means we’ve still got strong voices leading our state when it comes to ruling on fair electoral maps, reproductive freedom, LGBTQIA+ rights, and clean air and water.
🎉 **Democrats Mikie** **Sherrill in New Jersey and Abigail Spanberger in Virginia won their races for governor –** that’s two more states with leaders who actually give a sh*t about working people.
Now, we're less than a year out from the 2026 midterms. A BIG chance to vote folks into office who'll put working people first rather than cut health care, cut food stamps, or enrich themselves.

**We’ve got momentum. Real momentum. But we can’t let up – not for a second.**
[**We need every hand, every voice, and every dollar to keep this movement growing. My team set a rapid-response goal to raise $20,000 by midnight. Will you do your part to keep up this momentum and chip in $5 now?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52286?t=2&akid=10411%2E434096%2ENwsjV9)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5 NOW](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52287?t=3&akid=10411%2E434096%2ENwsjV9)

Last night proved what happens when we show up. The extremist, out-of-touch politicians heard us – and they’re on notice.
John ❤️

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z62v9317ig74jsg5h0917kiggkb74ccurekdop28_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cpjm1oj1chh2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z46cvvhdp8vv20hoqc28boc4bdadus7us6eb0tjo_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cpjm1oj1chh2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3itvseifqjstst297o16994kn3kqpb62ofjp29o_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cpjm1oj1chh2bs)
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3fj60ecr3nd94ibufjk20sles7l9bkp6hgaggfo_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cpjm1oj1chh2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlf42g3svuoorsgu51nih2l4e17kf4uqeon86s70_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cpjm1oj1chh2bs)

Pop Acta Media | Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z87iehme2lstad7dldcdss68314jaf82lkbp786o_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cpjm1oj1chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9ttle9q3bd9ieir38ct3mkrnctt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pb4cthm0pb24no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zq0r2786lqj3n1agelreu8cn69v9seel2sr8flog_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cpjm1oj1chh2bs)_

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: What last night’s election results mean.
body:
|
#
Friend, I’m sure you saw the news: Democrats scored major victories last night in Virginia and New Jersey. In California, voters passed Proposition 50 to fight back against GOP gerrymandering in states like Texas and North Carolina. These were the first big tests of voter energy heading into 2026 – and the results sent a clear message: when Democrats stay focused on lowering costs, creating jobs, and putting working families first, we win. **But here’s the thing we need to remember – MAGA isn’t going away, and they have seemingly limitless resources to unleash in 2026.** Our district is one of the most competitive in the country, and Republicans have already poured nearly a million dollars into false attack ads trying to flip this seat. They know that if we can win here, Democrats will be one step closer to taking back the House and stopping their agenda – one that raises costs, kills jobs, and undercuts freedoms. Last night’s results are worth celebrating. They’re also a call to action. If we want to keep the momentum going and make sure we have the resources to fight back, I’ll need your help. [**Can you chip in $3 today to help keep MI-08 blue and build on last night’s wins? clean_body: | Friend, I’m sure you saw the news: Democrats scored major victories last night in Virginia and New Jersey. In California, voters passed Proposition 50 to fight back against GOP gerrymandering in states like Texas and North Carolina. These were the first big tests of voter energy heading into 2026 – and the results sent a clear message: when Democrats stay focused on lowering costs, creating jobs, and putting working families first, we win. But here’s the thing we need to remember – MAGA isn’t going away, and they have seemingly limitless resources to unleash in 2026. Our district is one of the most competitive in the country, and Republicans have already poured nearly a million dollars into false attack ads trying to flip this seat. They know that if we can win here, Democrats will be one step closer to taking back the House and stopping their agenda – one that raises costs, kills jobs, and undercuts freedoms. Last night’s results are worth celebrating. They’re also a call to action. If we want to keep the momentum going and make sure we have the resources to fight back, I’ll need your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Kristen | We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . | | Last night, voters across the country sent a clear message: **the people's power is greater than anything Donald Trump and his cronies can throw at us.** There was phenomenal Blue energy! A blue pulsar! America has awoken and recognized the Trump nightmare is all too real. We reject his goal of making America sicker and poorer. We reject his authoritarian takeover. Grassroots organizers, volunteers knocking doors in the cold, neighbors having tough conversations, and millions of ordinary Americans standing up for democracy — it all added up to big Democratic wins across the country. **We're not just resisting authoritarianism, we're defeating it at the ballot box.** This is how we fight back. Not with fear.
Not with silence.
But with votes, organizing, and relentless hope. Trump and his allies want us to believe their grip on power is inevitable. But last night proved the opposite: every time we show up, every time we mobilize, every time we vote — _their authoritarian march loses ground._ And we can do it again in 2026. clean_body: The people’s power is greater than anything Donald Trump and his cronies can throw at us. | | | | Last night, voters across the country sent a clear message: the people's power is greater than anything Donald Trump and his cronies can throw at us. There was phenomenal Blue energy! A blue pulsar! America has awoken and recognized the Trump nightmare is all too real. We reject his goal of making America sicker and poorer. We reject his authoritarian takeover. Grassroots organizers, volunteers knocking doors in the cold, neighbors having tough conversations, and millions of ordinary Americans standing up for democracy — it all added up to big Democratic wins across the country. We're not just resisting authoritarianism, we're defeating it at the ballot box. This is how we fight back. Not with fear. Not with silence. But with votes, organizing, and relentless hope. Trump and his allies want us to believe their grip on power is inevitable. But last night proved the opposite: every time we show up, every time we mobilize, every time we vote — their authoritarian march loses ground. And we can do it again in 2026. But only if we keep building this movement and growing our momentum, starting right now. = Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = We win when democracy is powered by the people — not billionaires, not special interests, not would-be strongmen. Peter,

**Every day, I see something so crazy that it makes me reflect on how corrupt and psychotic the Radical Left is. Just today, I saw a video of a mentally ill person dancing in drag in front of children.**

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=3ca082f6ad63472880d8dcf9654459b6&_e=dY218GbzHy4Gzx7xXCE9fD4FhcIc5PRA8ahMIV6Be3WptqtrE-K6h55TSTbHBj6Dpi8YEAgMzaMzjec2log8Jdwg062xL1GjdMKiuFHw3pgKqd72GrfU2h3-tKq28EreVI_yuVO7IkGMYo7jx95OMTogEdlmrJ-kfYi8JFD78KnwFjKPPl_FFftT0gHbW-ETsdFwSwZ--ksEVFeXqufk16RC5rxYOZFjhy0zUG3K9ixCHHEU6eHo1tJUpMm6Ecr3T3RbGUGNiBenqIUZHcghey0zkNIKHMmLnhWwHhZ7uA1kz_10eN55cZswfCuGdhlBeeLtEeuOf8OmmOUOgkQGMCZqUQe9iw4a_h2uoOCqjn5bhGhpnYDxn---nVneC7FlJfUHOWXNITs4mILhISGtPySZ4wpf8jOxZkGV3tH5DuF--8BqythPKZyP6xH9SAwXp0TxbpMx8_Ezz6dHJR-kxDXfhLFPRDYFtgxBOMO43E2--uCGoIaoyR6LFt6wFtmHfMRn7o9JqFPVdT7YyLb-DC5R1pM1PmlBise7wi6zQQM%3D)
**They actually tried to force us to believe this is normal.** But they mock me for a (fake news) strip club... Don't let them gaslight you. This is not remotely normal. The more you tuck your tail, the more they will try to bend you over. That's the reality of wicked people.

They're all pedophiles, all of them that support this weird ass behavior. Let's just call it what it is and stop playing around. Or, keep dancing around it and join the dance with these freaks. Stand up, America, have some backbone and courage.

**I’m running for Senate in Minnesota to put an END to this nonsense. But I have a huge problem.**

The Left and the soft Uniparty know who I am. They know I’m running. And they’re all TERRIFIED of what I would do as a sitting United States Senator.

**They’re scared of common sense and a Black Republican who is not afraid to stand up to the freak behavior.**

_So they’re pouring MILLIONS of dollars into defeating me._

**Which is why I’m coming to you for help.** **[Will you chip in $10 before midnight to help me put an end to vile things like Drag Shows for children?](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=3ca082f6ad63472880d8dcf9654459b6&_e=dY218GbzHy4Gzx7xXCE9fD4FhcIc5PRA8ahMIV6Be3WptqtrE-K6h55TSTbHBj6Dpi8YEAgMzaMzjec2log8Jdwg062xL1GjdMKiuFHw3pgKqd72GrfU2h3-tKq28Ere2-6x1WcxuxtVQ4derWuyeRabFjB7gnUTaf73r-QSb9r7wnNtt9HDg2iTYr3osCdVAM71wwiE3QrN9ZXbHqT0MMqwPav6qWX5UxPPF0L_j2RkfwfEDSdHU9-IKkOSGtFFbjr23aLV4HcsAq5K-Wl-4zDqscNDrUEfNKS-vh2b5hEQGpBviVlinndRz30SoiWZuQv1x88xhIVBAHnkD8PIJlakuWiSNqf5YK9c9qtbKeFjo7aSDzjzugBYLfWVfiukRnwDs_FNEpmpXnfUZ_iAobylffLSM2XjTqtloXnKrf695wVmhoTawTovf0mbXoJ5GQy7HRKvy4KvA9qY8jjEKtOLXH5pa64UUwkZC4Cn4bXxD4Kd9ttTCdECIP9vR8YoT7OHcharAVEsjAwzb8z1adlR2PJ-o23rjshDA2c6c3RLa3k7QPycrfMKg6vxtWGi)**

clean_body: Drag shows for children? Miss us with that | Peter, Every day, I see something so crazy that it makes me reflect on how corrupt and psychotic the Radical Left is. Just today, I saw a video of a mentally ill person dancing in drag in front of children. They actually tried to force us to believe this is normal. But they mock me for a (fake news) strip club... Don't let them gaslight you. This is not remotely normal. The more you tuck your tail, the more they will try to bend you over. That's the reality of wicked people. They're all pedophiles, all of them that support this weird ass behavior. Let's just call it what it is and stop playing around. Or, keep dancing around it and join the dance with these freaks. Stand up, America, have some backbone and courage. I’m running for Senate in Minnesota to put an END to this nonsense. But I have a huge problem. The Left and the soft Uniparty know who I am. They know I’m running. And they’re all TERRIFIED of what I would do as a sitting United States Senator. They’re scared of common sense and a Black Republican who is not afraid to stand up to the freak behavior. So they’re pouring MILLIONS of dollars into defeating me. Which is why I’m coming to you for help. | Thank you, Royce White PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343 Copyright (C) 2025 Royce White For Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Becca Balint
subject: This isn’t business as usual any more…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81342/images/BalintYellowCircle.png]
Peter,

I’ve got three words for last night: We. Did. It.

Across the country, Democrats swept elections in a stunning rebuke of Donald Trump and his cruel, chaotic agenda. Voters sent a message loud and clear: we’ve had enoug h.

Enough of politicians who use fear to divide us.

Enough of leaders who pit neighbors against each other.

Enough of cruelty dressed up as policy.

Last night, our communities spoke. They said it’s not ok to criminalize your neighbors. It’s not ok to starve families for political points. It’s not ok to make healthcare unaffordable, to slash SNAP benefits, to send ICE into neighborhoods, or to turn our cities into political battlegrounds with the National Guard.

Because here’s the truth: the people are ready to fight back. We’ve seen the cruelty, the chaos, and the corruption, and we’re done letting it define who we are.

So yes, last night was a win. But it wasn’t luck... it was people power . It was organizers, voters, and neighbors showing up to say that compassion is stronger than cruelty and hope is stronger than fear.

But this fight doesn’t end today, we’re just getting started! While we’re up, let’s keep the momentum going.

CLICK HERE TO KEEP THE MOMENTUM GOING! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bb-email-20251105]

Because what we’re building together is bigger than one election. We’re taking on corporate greed, billionaire corruption, and the politicians who sell out the people, and we’re proving that real power still belongs to all of us.

Always with you in this fight,
— Becca Balint
beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com [beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com]

body:
This is just a prelude of the coming blue tsunami that will sweep MAGA out of power in the 2026 midterms.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mmn1paH1337msdjCWu_6ik5mHaEqbY6THwBVVVSUVewxgsJc8pN5pw_heXGVjuLm80LFlAI9RCJFFs9X7n3iStXKLa1YNfr2Npnc8w1xHNZWFEbvInTYbPZdWKCyHlDBw5nrHG-yZaf6bFaOPlo9Sqp32ZL95AbSF1sy_ie2lO-Uyjrbd1fFDWHWIik6viGkwaE12Nx-gs02_uLE63-W9_SBrjwmjsnF&c=PltKG-SxxdUruA1q0oCAr1WwgqRypkzjn74Dg5SZjqZDc9HdfHBEoA==&ch=JtQylz5zdtZUFHB99Hx8BLeg5ui8bqny5LA75rwoj1a1_B7gZk6ZXw==)

|

Peter,
Last night, voters across the country took to the polls for key elections--the VA and NJ governor races, the PA Supreme Court election, the NYC mayoral election, and Prop 50 ballot measure in CA to name a few.
And as the polls closed, winners were declared in mere minutes in each of these races. Why? Because Democrats kept winning by landslides.
This is just a prelude of the coming blue tsunami that will sweep MAGA out of power in the 2026 midterms.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mmn1paH1337msdjCWu_6ik5mHaEqbY6THwBVVVSUVewxgsJc8pN5pw_heXGVjuLm80LFlAI9RCJFFs9X7n3iStXKLa1YNfr2Npnc8w1xHNZWFEbvInTYbPZdWKCyHlDBw5nrHG-yZaf6bFaOPlo9Sqp32ZL95AbSF1sy_ie2lO-Uyjrbd1fFDWHWIik6viGkwaE12Nx-gs02_uLE63-W9xgh3tcjyjfu&c=PltKG-SxxdUruA1q0oCAr1WwgqRypkzjn74Dg5SZjqZDc9HdfHBEoA==&ch=JtQylz5zdtZUFHB99Hx8BLeg5ui8bqny5LA75rwoj1a1_B7gZk6ZXw==)
---

And last night's results are going to keep Lauren Boebert up at night because she's already hanging onto her seat by a thread.
Boebert's campaign only raised $100,000 last quarter (5 times less than our campaign), she is only in Congress because of 546 votes, and last time she faced our campaign, our campaign had the best performance of any Democrat ever in the district.
As a labor leader and federal public servant, Trisha Calvarese is running the type of populist campaign that Democrats used to run on and win with in districts like this. With a platform focused on affordability and centered on working-people, Trisha's momentum is surging.
In 2026, with Democrats poised for a historic blue wave, Trisha has the experience, grassroots army, and momentum to ride that wave all the way to victory and finish what she started.
[If you're as pumped as we are about last night's results, and are already as excited as we are for the coming blue tsunami in 2026, will you rush a contribution of $50, $25, or $10 to keep the momentum going for Democrats and help us defeat Lauren Boebert once and for all?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mmn1paH1337msdjCWu_6ik5mHaEqbY6THwBVVVSUVewxgsJc8pN5pw_heXGVjuLm80LFlAI9RCJFFs9X7n3iStXKLa1YNfr2Npnc8w1xHNZWFEbvInTYbPZdWKCyHlDBw5nrHG-yZaf6bFaOPlo9Sqp32ZL95AbSF1sy_ie2lO-Uyjrbd1fFDWHWIik6viGkwaE12Nx-gs02_uLE63-W9x5MNRWXSKfw&c=PltKG-SxxdUruA1q0oCAr1WwgqRypkzjn74Dg5SZjqZDc9HdfHBEoA==&ch=JtQylz5zdtZUFHB99Hx8BLeg5ui8bqny5LA75rwoj1a1_B7gZk6ZXw==)

body:

| 🚨**BREAKING ELECTION ALERT: Proposition 50 PASSED -- and California’s 22nd District just became the most important seat in the nation in the fight for the House majority.** Experts say CA-22 -- currently held by Republican David Valadao -- will now shift four points toward Democrats, instantly making it one of the most competitive congressional districts in the country. **[Democrats need to move fast. Rush in $3 right now to help Randy Villegas flip CA-22 and take back the Central Valley.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118717466/580662740/1733485174?refcode=em-11.5.25-rs-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2EzODNjN2ItNjliYS1mMDExLThlNjEtMDAyMjQ4MjRlMDhkIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mDnagED19iY_Dl989LJVaHQV89gWIJeh9Corhi7ClbY=)**

name: Mohan Seshadri
subject: API PA is Celebrating our Wins for Asian American Communities Across PA!
body:
https://www.apipennsylvania.org [https://www.apipennsylvania.org]
Dear Peter,
It's almost election day!
Bucks County residents have an important decision to make when we turn out for election day. Our local officials make up the frontlines of our communities — and the Sheriff and District Attorney are no exception.
Our Sheriff is responsible for keeping our communities safe, and our District Attorney is responsible for representing our community in court. We want to elect local officials that stand with our communities, that represent our interests, and that protect our families and neighbors. That's why we have endorsed Joe Khan for Bucks County District Attorney and Danny Ceisler for Bucks County Sheriff.
THIS WEEKEND: Join us to let our Bucks County neighbors know to make a plan to go and vote, and to vote for our endorsed candidates!
API PA Get out the Vote Bucks County Weekend of Action
Saturday, November 1, 2025 11:00 AM - 5:00 PM ET
RSVP [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Qw1GAI-k_0OL7fAsNlx8ww2]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/7033332F504C772F437849685257426634716668756A564C5237334B5263435A6B44325A7638563336692B7A424364765772593852464E45586B53646573666B/editor_images/OPEN%20%282%29.png]
See you there!
Anlin Wang
Organizer - Asian Pacific Islander Political Alliance

name: Michael Bennet
subject: First it was VA, then it was NJ ... next is CO
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
Democratic governors are now the last line of defense for everyday Americans – so I need your help to keep up last night's winning streak.
| | |
---
I've said it time and time again, friend:
With Trump and Republicans running the federal government into the ground, we can't look to Washington, D.C., for the vision our country urgently needs. That vision is going to have to come from the states – **and last night, the people of Virginia and New Jersey proved me right.**
They rejected Trump-endorsed Republican candidates and voted for Abigail Spanberger and Mikie Sherrill to lead their respective states into the future.
**[And so from here on out, over the next 362 days, I'm counting on you to help me keep up the streak here in Colorado's governor’s race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118717707/580663656/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk971-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWI4M2Y5MC02OWJhLWYwMTEtOGU2MS0wMDIyNDgyNGUwOGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JiFs55OMNCTLwto8Ylkl1FzjlG_1vTNzOgQQdLc1mVI=)**
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118717709/580663657/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk971-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWI4M2Y5MC02OWJhLWYwMTEtOGU2MS0wMDIyNDgyNGUwOGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JiFs55OMNCTLwto8Ylkl1FzjlG_1vTNzOgQQdLc1mVI=)
---
**Even as Trump and the GOP push through their destructive agenda to give huge tax breaks to billionaires at the expense of working families, they know __ full well that their policies are unpopular. **_That's_ why they're not holding in-person town halls. Instead, they're aggressively gerrymandering House districts nationwide and already working to undermine the legitimacy of mail-in voting in Colorado and other states.
With so much hard-fought progress at stake – from our fundamental freedoms to public health to education, our social safety net and more – **Democratic governors are now the last line of defense for everyday Americans.**
Virginia and New Jersey are the early bellwethers in the upcoming referendum on Trump's second term. And I'm glad to see that, so far, it's not going his way. But with **36** more governors' races on the ballot next year, Trump and his billionaire donor buddies will do everything, say everything, and spend every last cent they can to destroy the firewalls growing in the states.
**So if I'm going to protect the one we've got here in Colorado – _and make Colorado the best state to live, work and raise a family_ – I'm going to need as much help as I can get from folks like you, friend, starting today.**
**[We've got 362 days to build the critical campaign infrastructure, outreach and resources necessary to win and deliver GOP extremists a stunning rebuke come next Election Day. Will you please chip in $5, or anything you can, to help me follow in Abigail and Mikie's footsteps and build a winning gubernatorial campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118717711/580663658/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk971-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWI4M2Y5MC02OWJhLWYwMTEtOGU2MS0wMDIyNDgyNGUwOGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JiFs55OMNCTLwto8Ylkl1FzjlG_1vTNzOgQQdLc1mVI=)**

clean_body: Democratic governors are now the last line of defense for everyday Americans – so I need your help to keep up last night's winning streak. | | | I've said it time and time again, friend: With Trump and Republicans running the federal government into the ground, we can't look to Washington, D.C., for the vision our country urgently needs. That vision is going to have to come from the states – and last night, the people of Virginia and New Jersey proved me right. They rejected Trump-endorsed Republican candidates and voted for Abigail Spanberger and Mikie Sherrill to lead their respective states into the future. = | | = Even as Trump and the GOP push through their destructive agenda to give huge tax breaks to billionaires at the expense of working families, they know full well that their policies are unpopular. That's why they're not holding in-person town halls. Instead, they're aggressively gerrymandering House districts nationwide and already working to undermine the legitimacy of mail-in voting in Colorado and other states. With so much hard-fought progress at stake – from our fundamental freedoms to public health to education, our social safety net and more – Democratic governors are now the last line of defense for everyday Americans. Virginia and New Jersey are the early bellwethers in the upcoming referendum on Trump's second term. And I'm glad to see that, so far, it's not going his way. But with 36 more governors' races on the ballot next year, Trump and his billionaire donor buddies will do everything, say everything, and spend every last cent they can to destroy the firewalls growing in the states. So if I'm going to protect the one we've got here in Colorado – and make Colorado the best state to live, work and raise a family – I'm going to need as much help as I can get from folks like you, friend, starting today. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for being a part of this grassroots team – let's win this thing. Michael | Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States Paid for by Bennet for Governor. Registered Agent: Tracie Moore.
