name: The blues
subject: Here’s why Boebert couldn’t sleep last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
This is just a prelude of the coming blue tsunami that will sweep MAGA out of power in the 2026 midterms.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hekROHrGxgVnw7Qj6fRznIVbwbhtdZIHgCVpyLu4mrl6p2Ytq7AFcZoiOVxTYjBvW64biZfnOhKjFS-IEbtOtsSydVOvMGRH0OaU2pNnsdwxqCl4jBsat6d-yUYm6VMNDdrkGjScrhJg5N-m8ckGJMb5fvGgxi1-YdJFDdALT7y5LXdxkoOAWBwsQyBTiL6BDdjFy-av_8W3AJQT8OvvAhZ-7q8BKPY-qO-OJ0ZEbLQ=&c=B1qFe8QYpiVAAQAQilGIiFtTjuu8q93K0AY-hUyCGSw21GTTEwfskA==&ch=UUDTxz0RTjR5fo2eiSf4sG0HYzbi4XYihudgfSk3zr3eJ-5GVWeKJw==)
---
|

Peter,
Last night, voters across the country took to the polls for key elections--the VA and NJ governor races, the PA Supreme Court election, the NYC mayoral election, and Prop 50 ballot measure in CA to name a few.
And as the polls closed, winners were declared in mere minutes in each of these races. Why? Because Democrats kept winning by landslides.
This is just a prelude of the coming blue tsunami that will sweep MAGA out of power in the 2026 midterms.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hekROHrGxgVnw7Qj6fRznIVbwbhtdZIHgCVpyLu4mrl6p2Ytq7AFcZoiOVxTYjBvW64biZfnOhKjFS-IEbtOtsSydVOvMGRH0OaU2pNnsdwxqCl4jBsat6d-yUYm6VMNDdrkGjScrhJg5N-m8ckGJMb5fvGgxi1-YdJFDdALT7y5LXdxkoOAWBwsQyBTiL6BDdjFy-av_8W3AJQT8OvvAqkfe1dsgjNbD1nUpqhmWcQ=&c=B1qFe8QYpiVAAQAQilGIiFtTjuu8q93K0AY-hUyCGSw21GTTEwfskA==&ch=UUDTxz0RTjR5fo2eiSf4sG0HYzbi4XYihudgfSk3zr3eJ-5GVWeKJw==)
---

And last night's results are going to keep Lauren Boebert up at night because she's already hanging onto her seat by a thread.
Boebert's campaign only raised $100,000 last quarter (5 times less than our campaign), she is only in Congress because of 546 votes, and last time she faced our campaign, our campaign had the best performance of any Democrat ever in the district.
As a labor leader and federal public servant, Trisha Calvarese is running the type of populist campaign that Democrats used to run on and win with in districts like this. With a platform focused on affordability and centered on working-people, Trisha's momentum is surging.
In 2026, with Democrats poised for a historic blue wave, Trisha has the experience, grassroots army, and momentum to ride that wave all the way to victory and finish what she started.
[If you're as pumped as we are about last night's results, and are already as excited as we are for the coming blue tsunami in 2026, will you rush a contribution of $50, $25, or $10 to keep the momentum going for Democrats and help us defeat Lauren Boebert once and for all?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hekROHrGxgVnw7Qj6fRznIVbwbhtdZIHgCVpyLu4mrl6p2Ytq7AFcZoiOVxTYjBvmkFId-W7zL7NIKrpIfV5iu75zyVq1yncg6CZ-sF8M2Eetj0YA4mxIpL9nXuKnTdf4f_SUlDbRU38GoE-mjUjIidyW8W1nnFw4gRCJnGsm5jEHbThDhxEw7meRySAKTrZsAqCuT3yedrNfDcwmjKvZyYz50sycR8yx7AMi-DQigY-a0gpcxnnIg==&c=B1qFe8QYpiVAAQAQilGIiFtTjuu8q93K0AY-hUyCGSw21GTTEwfskA==&ch=UUDTxz0RTjR5fo2eiSf4sG0HYzbi4XYihudgfSk3zr3eJ-5GVWeKJw==)
---

clean_body: This is just a prelude of the coming blue tsunami that will sweep MAGA out of power in the 2026 midterms. | | | | | == | Peter, Last night, voters across the country took to the polls for key elections--the VA and NJ governor races, the PA Supreme Court election, the NYC mayoral election, and Prop 50 ballot measure in CA to name a few. And as the polls closed, winners were declared in mere minutes in each of these races. Why? Because Democrats kept winning by landslides. This is just a prelude of the coming blue tsunami that will sweep MAGA out of power in the 2026 midterms. | == And last night's results are going to keep Lauren Boebert up at night because she's already hanging onto her seat by a thread. Boebert's campaign only raised $100,000 last quarter (5 times less than our campaign), she is only in Congress because of 546 votes, and last time she faced our campaign, our campaign had the best performance of any Democrat ever in the district. As a labor leader and federal public servant, Trisha Calvarese is running the type of populist campaign that Democrats used to run on and win with in districts like this. With a platform focused on affordability and centered on working-people, Trisha's momentum is surging. In 2026, with Democrats poised for a historic blue wave, Trisha has the experience, grassroots army, and momentum to ride that wave all the way to victory and finish what she started. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | We appreciate what you do for us and Democrats across the country. When we stand together against MAGA, we can - and do - win.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118719286/580669524/1435897075?refcode=email_110525_oneyear&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTJlMzFkZC02YWJhLWYwMTEtOGU2MS0wMDIyNDgyNGUwOGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lQHNk17oljtOjQOEYgX4A8qUcKk6roLhPxxvjvSXXCE=&emci=6f2e31dd-6aba-f011-8e61-00224824e08d&emdi=712e31dd-6aba-f011-8e61-00224824e08d&ceid=7280715) One year ago today, Donald Trump and Republicans won control of the White House and Congress — and ever since they took office, we’ve been living through crisis after crisis. Let’s be clear: chaos is their strategy. They want to wear us down, to make us tune out, to make us believe change isn’t possible. Because if we give in — even for a moment — they’ll expand their power and push their extreme MAGA agenda even further. **We absolutely cannot let that happen. And last night, voters sent a powerful message: when we stand united in the fight against MAGA, we can—and do—win.** Every call you make, every new voter you register, every No Kings rally you attend — it all matters. This is how we fight back. We're building undeniable momentum now and next year’s midterms are our best chance yet to prove that the American people won’t be silenced or sidelined. We cannot throw away that opportunity. **John Hickenlooper will continue fighting with everything he has to lower healthcare costs, protect Colorado’s public lands, and restore fundamental freedoms. name: Tim Walz
subject: re: yesterday’s election results
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
Let’s keep this momentum going through 2026 and beyond!
#
Peter,
I’m so damn proud to be a Democrat.
Voters showed up last night – in New Jersey, Virginia, New York, and right here in Minnesota. They sent a clear message: **Americans don’t like what Trump is doing.**
We don’t like wannabe dictators that kidnap our neighbors off the street, steal food from hungry kids, and attack folks for being who they are.
We don’t like handing the keys to our country to a handful of rich guys on a power trip.
We want a country where everyone gets a fair shot – and we’re going to fight like hell for it.
The momentum is on our side, Peter, but it’s on us to take advantage of this moment and keep it going into 2026 and beyond.
**[Rush a donation right now to keep building a movement that can win and ensure Minnesota stays blue next November.](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251105.ptDsZJ&amount=5&refcode=em20251105-53&t=1&akid=53%2E34582%2EolP6GZ)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251105.ptDsZJ&amount=5&refcode=20251105-53&t=20&akid=53%2E34582%2EolP6GZ)**
Thank you,
Tim

Under Governor Walz’s leadership, Minnesota is showing the world what’s possible when we come together with grit, compassion, and a shared sense of purpose.
We secured free school meals for every student, cut child poverty, passed Paid Family Leave, delivered record investments in education, and more.
**[Now we need your help to stop MAGA Republicans from dragging us backward. Pitch in $5 today to help us win this race and keep moving forward — together.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251105-53&t=21&refcode2=53_34582_olP6GZ&akid=53%2E34582%2EolP6GZ)**
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251105-53&t=22&refcode2=53_34582_olP6GZ&akid=53%2E34582%2EolP6GZ)**
Email us: [info@walzforgovernor.org](mailto:info@walzforgovernor.org)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

clean_body: Let’s keep this momentum going through 2026 and beyond! Peter, I’m so damn proud to be a Democrat. Voters showed up last night – in New Jersey, Virginia, New York, and right here in Minnesota. They sent a clear message: Americans don’t like what Trump is doing. We don’t like wannabe dictators that kidnap our neighbors off the street, steal food from hungry kids, and attack folks for being who they are. We don’t like handing the keys to our country to a handful of rich guys on a power trip. We want a country where everyone gets a fair shot – and we’re going to fight like hell for it. The momentum is on our side, Peter, but it’s on us to take advantage of this moment and keep it going into 2026 and beyond. Thank you, Tim Under Governor Walz’s leadership, Minnesota is showing the world what’s possible when we come together with grit, compassion, and a shared sense of purpose. We secured free school meals for every student, cut child poverty, passed Paid Family Leave, delivered record investments in education, and more. Email us: mailto:info@walzforgovernor.org

Stamp Payments This Month. The government said it would send the aid after
a court ruled last week that it must preserve the program known as SNAP
during the shutdown.

The headlines speak for themselves. Donald Trump gets an extravagant new
ballroom at the White House, congressional Republicans get a paid
vacation, and American families go hungry.

Trump and the GOP are happy to leave working people out to dry, and real
families across Wisconsin and the country are feeling the impact. To them,
this is all just a political game.

clean_body: [ ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE Team, Tammy is fighting tooth and nail in Washington to make life better for working Wisconsinites. Meanwhile, this is where Republicans stand: [ ]The New York Times: Trump Administration to Send Only Partial Food Stamp Payments This Month. The government said it would send the aid after a court ruled last week that it must preserve the program known as SNAP during the shutdown. The headlines speak for themselves. Donald Trump gets an extravagant new ballroom at the White House, congressional Republicans get a paid vacation, and American families go hungry. Trump and the GOP are happy to leave working people out to dry, and real families across Wisconsin and the country are feeling the impact. To them, this is all just a political game. [ ]Tammy is doing what she can to fight back, but she can’t do it alone. If it’s in your budget today, will you please chip in to help Tammy keep up this fight in the Senate? | | Peter, It’s PA Lieutenant Governor and DLGA Chair, Austin Davis. **Last night, two of my good friends, Ghazala Hashmi and Dr. Dale Caldwell, won their election campaigns in Virginia and New Jersey for Lieutenant Governor.** I want to welcome them to the DLGA family! Throughout her tenure in the State Senate, Ghazala has shown thoughtful leadership, a deep commitment to public service, and a proven record of delivering results. Democrats just won BIG in Pennsylvania. Last night, voters across the Commonwealth stood up, rejected Republican extremism, and voted to keep our state Supreme Court in Democratic hands.

| Peter,

Democrats just won BIG in Pennsylvania.

Last night, voters across the Commonwealth stood up, rejected Republican extremism, and overwhelmingly voted to keep our state Supreme Court in Democratic hands. Right here in the 7th District, we elected Democratic Executives in Lehigh and Northampton Counties by larger margins than we’ve seen in almost two decades.

These victories show that Pennsylvanians are tired of MAGA politicians trying to roll back our rights and rig our courts and local politics for their own agendas.

Voters turned out to defend justice, fairness, and the rule of law.

This is proof that when we organize, fight back, and show up...we WIN.

But this momentum can’t stop here. Every victory like this one is a stepping stone toward 2026 and beyond – and we need to keep building.

clean_body: Democrats just won BIG in Pennsylvania. Last night, voters across the Commonwealth stood up, rejected Republican extremism, and voted to keep our state Supreme Court in Democratic hands. | = | Peter, Democrats just won BIG in Pennsylvania. Last night, voters across the Commonwealth stood up, rejected Republican extremism, and overwhelmingly voted to keep our state Supreme Court in Democratic hands. Right here in the 7th District, we elected Democratic Executives in Lehigh and Northampton Counties by larger margins than we’ve seen in almost two decades. These victories show that Pennsylvanians are tired of MAGA politicians trying to roll back our rights and rig our courts and local politics for their own agendas. Voters turned out to defend justice, fairness, and the rule of law. This is proof that when we organize, fight back, and show up...we WIN. But this momentum can’t stop here. Every victory like this one is a stepping stone toward 2026 and beyond – and we need to keep building. = | | | = | = | = | = | = – Carol * | | = Paid for by Carol for PA Carol for PA P.O Box 83 Allentown, PA 18105 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

name: Derek Tran
subject: LA Times: CA-45 still a target for Republicans.

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118721522/580675447/-1516755731?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTNiOWNiNDUtNzFiYS1mMDExLThlNjEtMDAyMjQ4MjRlMDhkIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=q9aT6MrKqbejNDYb_XDgoCCz4-mvfDkBDeN6syeGNV0=)
It’s official:

**Proposition 50 has passed in California.** Voters made a statement to defend our democracy and keep our elections free and fair.

California will redraw its Congressional maps to fight back against extreme GOP gerrymandering in states like Texas. Republicans want to rig the game to keep the MAGA agenda in power -- even if it means silencing millions of voters nationwide.

It’s not an exaggeration to say that Prop 50 changes _everything_ in our race. Thousands of new voters will be added to California’s 45th District.

It’s going to take an all-out push to hold this seat, and while many Democratic-held seats are becoming safer, _the _Los Angeles Times_ lists CA-45 as one of a few districts that remain within reach of the GOP._
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118721528/580675455/-1516755731?refcode=em-11.5.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTNiOWNiNDUtNzFiYS1mMDExLThlNjEtMDAyMjQ4MjRlMDhkIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=q9aT6MrKqbejNDYb_XDgoCCz4-mvfDkBDeN6syeGNV0=)
I flipped this seat in 2024 by a razor-thin margin. 653 votes separated me and my far-right opponent. Now, we need to act fast to reach thousands of voters who may have never heard of me, my story, or my vision for Southern California.

It’s going to take an all-out push to hold this seat, and while many Democratic-held seats are becoming safer, the Los Angeles Times lists CA-45 as one of a few districts that remain within reach of the GOP. = I flipped this seat in 2024 by a razor-thin margin. 653 votes separated me and my far-right opponent. Now, we need to act fast to reach thousands of voters who may have never heard of me, my story, or my vision for Southern California. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Derek | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Incredible
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Team,
When I founded GIFFORDS, many people said that gun safety wasn’t a winning issue. They warned me that we wouldn’t be able to withstand the big-dollar attacks from the gun lobby.
We just proved them wrong.
Last night, gun safety champions Abigail Spanberger and Mikie Sherrill won landslide victories to become the next governors of Virginia and New Jersey. These two leaders, who ran on public safety agendas, will make our movement stronger.
But we didn’t stop there: Gun safety champions won elections _at every level._
We gained the biggest Democratic majority in Virginia’s statehouse in nearly 40 years with over 60 GIFFORDS PAC endorsed candidates winning their races. We broke the GOP’s supermajority in the Mississippi Senate and surged to a Democratic supermajority in the New Jersey Assembly. And we won a ballot measure in Maine, passing a critical red flag law — two years after the Lewiston shooting that took 18 lives.
**Together, we made our voices heard loud and clear: Gun safety is a winning issue in swing states and districts everywhere.**
But the fight isn’t over. Now, all eyes will be on the midterms. With your support, we must work to take back Congress and elect a gun safety majority across the country.
[**I am humbly asking you to pitch in to GIFFORDS PAC today. Your support will help us beat back the gun lobby and elect even more gun safety leaders across the country.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251107-1-b&t=1&akid=11021%2E3935704%2E42J9WF)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

---
****
A better future is always possible. Thank you. ❤️
Gabby Giffords
**Please, take a second to read this...**
Gabby Giffords has led the fight against the gun lobby for more than a decade, but she can't do it alone.
If everyone reading this donated just $17, we'd have the resources to take on the gun lobby in Congress and states across the country. But not everyone gives -- making it even more important for people who care and understand the stakes of our struggle to pitch in what they can.
If $17 seems worth it to you to change our gun laws in order to make our communities safer from gun violence, we're asking you to contribute to GIFFORDS PAC today.

| Peter,

We just won a major victory.

Trump and Texas started it, but we finished it.

California voters passed Proposition 50, a bold reform to strengthen our democracy and fight back against Republican gerrymandering and extremism.

This win is proof of what we can do when we organize, mobilize, and refuse to give up.

This is just the beginning.

Across the country, MAGA extremists are doing everything they can to silence our voices and rig the system in their favor. We can’t let them succeed.

clean_body: The Senate is in play, everyone... = | | = = From North Carolina to Maine to Ohio, we’ve got top-notch Democrats ready to flip seats. And as last night’s blue wave shows:we can do it. Democrats overperformed in races across the country — even flipping two statewide Public Service Commission seats in Georgia for the first time in 25 years. These victories don’t just happen. They’re not pulled out of thin air. They take grassroots folks like you, stepping up when you can, to power Democrats to victory. I won’t sugarcoat it: taking back the Senate is a tall order. But the momentum is on our side. We just have to keep it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = Let’s go! Senator Kirsten Gillibrand Chair, Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee * A message from DSCC Chair Kirsten Gillibrand: =

name: Mark Warner
subject: Last night:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118723366/580681506/1122353663?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Results_251105_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzI4N2E4ZC03MmJhLWYwMTEtOGU2MS0wMDIyNDgyNGUwOGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lq4BDg4i4un6D9ohQ0Pd8nZT6pWQZ3O3dzkagaORAVM=) Derek,

Last night was an important step towards taking back our country – but it was only the start.

For months now, President Trump has fought to rig the House map in his favor in an attempt to maintain control of Congress in the midterms – despite how deeply unpopular his agenda is with voters.

He already ordered Texas and North Carolina Republicans to further gerrymander their House districts to force out as many House Democrats as possible. And after watching Democrats' results last night, Republicans aren’t going to stop there.

**This is a Republican Party that has sold its heart and soul to whatever Donald Trump wants – no matter the cost to our democracy.**

The harsh reality is, we have two options in this moment:

1\. Sit back and let Trump avoid accountability by rigging the maps in his favor.

2\. Stand up. Push Back. And do everything in our power to win the midterms, elect a Democratic-controlled Congress, and finally have the power we need to put a check on this out-of-control president.

Virginia has a unique opportunity next year to redistrict and _**flip up to four House seats for Democrats**_ to help offset Trump’s attempt to rig the map for Republicans. Last night’s results prove we are on a path to make it happen, but we’ve got to start building the infrastructure NOW to compete in all corners of Virginia.

[_**Our work starts now. Not tomorrow. Not next year. More than ever before, I need you in this fight with me. Can I count on your contribution today to support Virginia’s redistricting efforts, elect Democrats across the Commonwealth, and flip the balance of power in Washington?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118723368/580681508/1122353663?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Results_251105_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzI4N2E4ZC03MmJhLWYwMTEtOGU2MS0wMDIyNDgyNGUwOGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lq4BDg4i4un6D9ohQ0Pd8nZT6pWQZ3O3dzkagaORAVM=) **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118723370/580681510/1122353663?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Results_251105_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzI4N2E4ZC03MmJhLWYwMTEtOGU2MS0wMDIyNDgyNGUwOGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lq4BDg4i4un6D9ohQ0Pd8nZT6pWQZ3O3dzkagaORAVM=)** This is not an action we should take lightly. Just a few years ago, I was proud to support Virginia’s referendum to establish a non-partisan redistricting commission.

But with Trump in the White House, the stakes are too high to sit on the sidelines and accept defeat in a rigged game.

More soon,

Mark Warner **Before you go:**

Mark Warner is leading the fight to hold the Trump administration accountable – but that could make his race a top Republican target next year.

We need to be prepared for his toughest and most expensive reelection campaign yet.

[_**Will you consider a contribution today as an early investment in the campaign infrastructure we're building? Your donation today will have a much bigger impact than a donation of the same size a year from now.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118723372/580681512/1122353663?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Results_251105_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzI4N2E4ZC03MmJhLWYwMTEtOGU2MS0wMDIyNDgyNGUwOGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lq4BDg4i4un6D9ohQ0Pd8nZT6pWQZ3O3dzkagaORAVM=)**__********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118723374/580681514/1122353663?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Results_251105_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzI4N2E4ZC03MmJhLWYwMTEtOGU2MS0wMDIyNDgyNGUwOGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lq4BDg4i4un6D9ohQ0Pd8nZT6pWQZ3O3dzkagaORAVM=)**********

name: Sarah Kline
subject: There’s so much on the horizon — will you support our work?
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2?am=50&amtOpts=&recurringAm=50&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=7bTDWF96N63UCEWRxQf4TSItPkKbUTO23lhWtpUe1HlcuutL58hIxrTXRhq5tO3KwyauEcveMOljv7K+4N1aaUEsRtSst3jKbUWies0/+9qKlBYJtY+0hW+VGNQ+3VtH [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2?am=50&amtOpts=&recurringAm=50&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=7bTDWF96N63UCEWRxQf4TSItPkKbUTO23lhWtpUe1HlcuutL58hIxrTXRhq5tO3KwyauEcveMOljv7K+4N1aaUEsRtSst3jKbUWies0/+9qKlBYJtY+0hW+VGNQ+3VtH]
Dear Peter,
With the current state of our country, imagining a climate safe and just future can feel like a reach. The attacks we’ve seen on our climate and environment in these first few months of Trump’s administration are unprecedented and daunting. But if we stop dreaming, then they have won. Peter [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=7bTDWF96N63UCEWRxQf4TSItPkKbUTO23lhWtpUe1HlcuutL58hIxrTXRhq5tO3KwyauEcveMOljv7K+4N1aaUEsRtSst3jKbUWies0/+9qKlBYJtY+0hW+VGNQ+3VtH] , will you make a generous gift of $50 now, using Oregon’s Political Tax Credit, to invest in our state’s future? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2]
Give now [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=7bTDWF96N63UCEWRxQf4TSItPkKbUTO23lhWtpUe1HlcuutL58hIxrTXRhq5tO3KwyauEcveMOljv7K+4N1aaUEsRtSst3jKbUWies0/+9qKlBYJtY+0hW+VGNQ+3VtH]
We know that there are many critical issues that need investment right now. But if you’re on our email list, you know how intertwined our climate and environment is in all of these issues, and how important it is for us to elect the right people to stand up for our values.
In this age of relentless federal attacks, we look to our state leaders to hold the bar for Oregon. Our state work has become more important than ever. While it’s hard to believe that 2026 is just around the corner, it is a big election year for both our state and the federal government, so we’re already building our resources to win big. With Oregon’s Political Tax Credit, you can make a free-to-you, tax-deductible gift of $50 or $100 to the OLCV PAC! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2]
You are eligible for Oregon’s Political Tax Credit if:
✔ You are an Oregon resident
✔ You will submit an Oregon tax return for 2024
✔ You make less than $75,000 (individual) or $150,000 (couple filing jointly)
Give now [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=7bTDWF96N63UCEWRxQf4TSItPkKbUTO23lhWtpUe1HlcuutL58hIxrTXRhq5tO3KwyauEcveMOljv7K+4N1aaUEsRtSst3jKbUWies0/+9qKlBYJtY+0hW+VGNQ+3VtH]
Next November’s general election is one year from now, but our work of electing pro-climate candidates has already begun. Don’t let your Political Tax Credit go to waste this year, when it can ensure that we elect leaders right here in Oregon that will uphold our values in 2026! Can you make your free donation to the OLCV PAC now? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2]
With gratitude,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Sarah%20Signature.png]
Sarah Kline (she/they)
OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator

clean_body: [] Dear Peter, With the current state of our country, imagining a climate safe and just future can feel like a reach. The attacks we’ve seen on our climate and environment in these first few months of Trump’s administration are unprecedented and daunting. But if we stop dreaming, then they have won. Peter [] , will you make a generous gift of $50 now, using Oregon’s Political Tax Credit, to invest in our state’s future? [] Give now [] We know that there are many critical issues that need investment right now. But if you’re on our email list, you know how intertwined our climate and environment is in all of these issues, and how important it is for us to elect the right people to stand up for our values. In this age of relentless federal attacks, we look to our state leaders to hold the bar for Oregon. Our state work has become more important than ever. While it’s hard to believe that 2026 is just around the corner, it is a big election year for both our state and the federal government, so we’re already building our resources to win big. With Oregon’s Political Tax Credit, you can make a free-to-you, tax-deductible gift of $50 or $100 to the OLCV PAC! [] You are eligible for Oregon’s Political Tax Credit if: ✔ You are an Oregon resident ✔ You will submit an Oregon tax return for 2024 ✔ You make less than $75,000 (individual) or $150,000 (couple filing jointly) Give now [] Next November’s general election is one year from now, but our work of electing pro-climate candidates has already begun. Don’t let your Political Tax Credit go to waste this year, when it can ensure that we elect leaders right here in Oregon that will uphold our values in 2026! Can you make your free donation to the OLCV PAC now? [] With gratitude, [] Sarah Kline (she/they) OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator P.S.: We are in the big push for end of year fundraising. If you would no longer like to receive emails related to end of year fundraising, please fill out this form here to opt-out [] but still remain on our general email list! [] [] [] [] Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Let’s keep this momentum going — right into flipping NC’s U.S. Senate seat blue.
body:
Are you as fired up about last night’s results as I am, Peter?

Abigail Spanberger and Mikie Sherrill’s wins in Virginia and New Jersey are a strong sign of momentum for Democratic candidates and against the extreme GOP — now, we need to keep it up. Can you invest any amount in our campaign today to help? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvf_email_fr]

Peter, we are beginning to turn the tide for the American people, and if we can harness this energy going into the midterms, I am confident that we can stop the MAGA agenda in Washington and beyond. But Republicans have cash on their side.

Here in NC, they’re starting to spend hundreds of millions against me — and we expect more to come. In fact, experts think this could be the first-ever billion-dollar U.S. Senate race... all to cement GOP control in Washington.

We have aggressive plans for voter outreach to spread our message to every corner of this state, but we can’t just play offense. We have to defend against GOP attacks as well.

We have less than a year to counter the MAGA movement’s lies and mega-donors. That means we need the financial strength to take them on, dollar for dollar, for the next 363 days. If you’re with me, I’m asking you to pitch in whatever you can, so that next year’s Election Day is as big a success as this one. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvf_email_fr]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvf_email_fr?express_lane=true&amount=5]

DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvf_email_fr?express_lane=true&amount=10]

DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvf_email_fr?express_lane=true&amount=25]

DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvf_email_fr?express_lane=true&amount=50]

DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvf_email_fr?express_lane=true&amount=100]

DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvf_email_fr?express_lane_other=true]

Thanks so much,

Roy Cooper

Contact us [info@roycooper.com] |
Privacy Policy [https://roycooper.com/privacy-policy/]

Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602

Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.

Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you wish to receive fewer messages, submit this form to let us know. subject: One year from now
disclaimer_text: paid for by Simon for Secretary of State Committee
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118723476/580681968/-1787004069?refcode=header&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjU4ODA2MzktNzNiYS1mMDExLThlNjEtMDAyMjQ4MjRlMDhkIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Q7BwECwWJqXub_4b1lthX_yD1sICFUWrm4SeP4KtMg4=) | **One year from now, Minnesotans will choose who safeguards our democracy.** As Secretary of State, I’ve spent this year doing exactly that; defending the freedom to vote and protecting Minnesotans’ privacy from unlawful federal overreach. When the Department of Justice demanded unlawful access to private voter data, I refused. When false claims about mail-in ballots spread, I told the truth. When disinformation threatened trust in our elections, I fought back, and we won. This work never stops, and the next year will be our toughest yet. My opponent and national extremists are already preparing to flood our state with lies and lawsuits. **[We need to start strong. We need another 250 people to join us this week. clean_body: = | One year from now, Minnesotans will choose who safeguards our democracy. As Secretary of State, I’ve spent this year doing exactly that; defending the freedom to vote and protecting Minnesotans’ privacy from unlawful federal overreach. When the Department of Justice demanded unlawful access to private voter data, I refused. When false claims about mail-in ballots spread, I told the truth. When disinformation threatened trust in our elections, I fought back, and we won. This work never stops, and the next year will be our toughest yet. subject: This story sold out in three hours
body:
It may seem a little early to talk about Christmas, but I had to make sure I got your attention.

| | |

| |

Dear Fellow Conservative, It may seem a little early to talk about Christmas, but I had to make sure I got your attention. Because **BRAVE Books** is facing a real Christmas crunch. And as one of our best supporters in our mission to instill conservative values in children using high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment... **[...I thought you'd want to be one of the first to know what's going on.](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyUkcuu2yAQhp8G77C42EAWXsTH8WkXqaqoSpeIyyRGtSECnKpvX6U65wG6nE8zI33___OszyasId6_mQ0GZ3Uuui6hlJryn5JWn_YaYl0ywJI0I6zHlGLSv_Zo4wd3ANbZroGBSsG4EL3izTKww00JJjnpHTeC2IMlXFHLhAQHPXRNGF6_KCU9VbSnqiVUSKUEcEl4p6hDHQEfasqtS7FAfpoanmBzMt6ZUtsItVmHpdZHQfyI2IzYXMDtGVoTwafaurQhNttsnoBtSr8KYjNYJ8D1HZZcWtxJBVg54NgrK24ggN2AIT7vddMl7dkB4tM4vePL6YqYeOENfNg3xKfT-YM4sz1MuEfEpw8nqsfpXY-X4_Wkz19_fPk3Xk5X_f2I38bPsxQrxIr49DbizzCaPPjH77CuoQiJOnLfTFhfJk3973KeA_sbAAD__9WZl3A) ** **Friend, BRAVE Books** has introduced _Mouse in the House_ as a Christian alternative to that other secular "Christmas" game where parents hide a stuffed elf around the house to "spy" on the children to make sure they behave well to earn Santa's gifts. My friends at**BRAVE Books** knew families deserved something better to teach the true meaning of Christmas. So, they created _Mouse in the House_ to help parents emphasize the joy of _giving_ more than _getting_ in this most blessed season. And boy, did parents respond. The first year it was introduced,___Mouse in the House_ sold out in THREE HOURS! Friend, I know it's only November, but this year we don't want to turn any families away because of unexpectedly high demand.

| | You understand that **BRAVE Books** is fighting to restore our culture because we can't just give up and let the radicals erase America's Judeo-Christian values. >>> Your support has already helped get "See You at the Library" kits to thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens who gathered at over 201 libraries in 46 states (including the Library of Congress!) to take back our libraries. Together, we countered the Left's radical and ungodly "Drag Queen Story Hours" and filled children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. >>> Your last gift helped us finish filming TWO whole seasons of our historic TV show "Iggy and Mr. Kirk." This is the very first television show funded by everyday Americans to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. "Iggy and Mr. Kirk" is our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" that uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great. >>> And now you are the difference between success and failure with our "More Mouse in the House!" campaign. Just look at what parents have already said about our _Mouse in the House_ Christmas bundle that comes with a beautiful book and adorable stuffed mouse:

Thank you, Brave Books!!!" -- Jenae K. _ _" I love the Godly service ideas!" - Susan _ _" I love the Mouse in the House. The giving nature of the story reflects the theme of the Christmas season." - Kat F._

clean_body: It may seem a little early to talk about Christmas, but I had to make sure I got your attention. | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, It may seem a little early to talk about Christmas, but I had to make sure I got your attention. Because BRAVE Books is facing a real Christmas crunch. And as one of our best supporters in our mission to instill conservative values in children using high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment... Friend, BRAVE Books has introduced Mouse in the House as a Christian alternative to that other secular "Christmas" game where parents hide a stuffed elf around the house to "spy" on the children to make sure they behave well to earn Santa's gifts. My friends atBRAVE Books knew families deserved something better to teach the true meaning of Christmas. So, they created Mouse in the House to help parents emphasize the joy of giving more than getting in this most blessed season. And boy, did parents respond. The first year it was introduced,_Mouse in the House sold out in THREE HOURS! Friend, I know it's only November, but this year we don't want to turn any families away because of unexpectedly high demand. | | | BRAVE Books is ramping up production big-time and fast. Friend, you're one of our best supporters and I'm so grateful. | | BRAVE Books is ramping up production big-time and fast. Friend, you're one of our best supporters and I'm so grateful. | | You understand that BRAVE Books is fighting to restore our culture because we can't just give up and let the radicals erase America's Judeo-Christian values. >>> Your support has already helped get "See You at the Library" kits to thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens who gathered at over 201 libraries in 46 states (including the Library of Congress!) to take back our libraries. Together, we countered the Left's radical and ungodly "Drag Queen Story Hours" and filled children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. >>> Your last gift helped us finish filming TWO whole seasons of our historic TV show "Iggy and Mr. Kirk." This is the very first television show funded by everyday Americans to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. "Iggy and Mr. Kirk" is our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" that uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great. >>> And now you are the difference between success and failure with our "More Mouse in the House!" campaign. Just look at what parents have already said about our Mouse in the House Christmas bundle that comes with a beautiful book and adorable stuffed mouse: " So thankful for a thoughtful new Christmas tradition for our children. The story is sweet, the explanation of Christmas is poignant, and the mouse is so adorable. Thank you, Brave Books!!!" -- Jenae K. " I love the Godly service ideas!" - Susan " I love the Mouse in the House. The giving nature of the story reflects the theme of the Christmas season." - Kat F. Friend, parents are hungry for Godly content that helps them counter the wicked culture. And your support helps BRAVE Books supply it. Your gift helps BRAVE Books complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools. Friend, nothing we accomplish is possible without you. And that's why as a thank you for being such a faithful and faith-filled friend, when you contribute $100 or more to our "More Mouse in the House!" campaign... ...we will send one out to you absolutely free. You can keep the Mouse in the House Christmas bundle for your family, you can gift it to someone you love... ...or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn't have a Christian role model in their life. BRAVE Books is working round the clock to get enough Mouse in the House Christmas bundles produced and all the orders filled in time. Friend, THANK YOU for helping. BRAVE Books would have no chance of beating Hollywood, giant left-leaning publishers, and big government-funded libraries and schools without you. Thank you for taking a minute to help with our "More Mouse in the House!" campaign. You're bringing the true meaning of Christmas to families all across America. Thank you and may God bless you and God bless America, | | Sincerely, Kirk Cameron P.S. Friend, it's only November and we're already in a Christmas crunch! Families are clamoring for our Mouse in the House Christmas bundle to counter the Left's secular interpretation of this most blessed season. And as a thank you for your gift of $100 or more we'll send you your very own Mouse in the House for your family! Thank you! -- Kirk | | | Brave Books 3528 S Loop 336 E Suite C Conroe, TX 77301 | | | ---|---|--- Pop Acta Media | Conservative Broadcast PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | -_

name: Norma Shulman and Bill Galvin
subject: Strong statewide effort for Election Day Voter Registration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Election%20Day%20Voter%20Reg%20New%20Header.png]
Dear Peter,
Great day!
Many thanks to the great team who was out collecting signatures for Election Day Voter Registration at the polls yesterday.
Great work!
We had a statewide effort made up of state committee members, town and ward committee members, and elected officials from Pittsfield to Nantucket, from Boston to Fall River, from Salem to Milton working hard to get our petition on the ballot!
Great response!
As the WCVB/UMASS poll confirmed earlier this week Massachusetts voters strongly support Election Day Voter Registration. If we can build on this the momentum and continue to collect more signatures at local events or upcoming meetings, we will get this effort across the finish line and on the ballot.
See Poll Results [https://htv-prod-media.s3.amazonaws.com/files/senatetoplinesoct2025masspoll-69088d6f1af87.pdf]
Let's make this happen!
If you have collected signatures, please submit them to the local election official as soon as possible. The local submission deadline is 5pm on Wednesday, November 19th but please submit as soon as you can.
Access to Petition in PDF Format [https://drive.google.com/file/d/1JpIPxAcZ0isl3EN-zUDcLtPjIE9ErdQy/view]
If you have any questions please email us at info@electiondayvoterregistration.com [info@electiondayvoterregistration.com] or visit www.electiondayvoterregistration.com [http://www.electiondayvoterregistration.com/] .
Your hard work is greatly appreciated and is making a difference.
Visit Website [www.electiondayvoterregistration.com]
Thank you,
Norma Shulman and Bill Galvin
info@electiondayvoterregistration.com [info@electiondayvoterregistration.com]

name: Protect Democracy
subject: What’s really at stake right now
body:
Authoritarian forces are testing the strength of our democracy — and we must respond.
[](https://go.m.protectourdemocracyfund.org/l/9G7m6SUxGFIFpbhnm8-tkcQ2fSm0GcHcByuc-WIIxh0)Every day, our democracy faces new threats — from efforts to undermine free elections to attacks on an independent judiciary and the free press. These aren’t isolated incidents. They’re part of a broader campaign to erode trust in our democratic institutions and concentrate power in the hands of a few.
At Protect Our Democracy Fund, we’re confronting these dangers head-on by pushing for accountability, transparency, and reform. We’re standing up for the principles that define America — freedom, justice, and equality under the law.
The truth is, if we don’t act now, the damage could become irreversible.
👉 [See what’s at stake and why this fight matters](https://go.m.protectourdemocracyfund.org/l/9G7m6SUxGFIFpbhnm8-tkR9uHol1GYIQ0y8H8G7sHw4)
Together, we can stop the slide toward authoritarianism — and build a stronger, fairer democracy for all.
Protect Our Democracy Fund

I value your opinion, Fellow Conservative.

No one understands what's at stake in these midterm elections better than you--because the outcomes will directly impact your daily life, from the cost of groceries to the safety of your neighborhood.

As the past Governor of South Dakota, I delivered real results by following conservative principles that don't fail. I brought that same approach to Washington as your U.S. Senator, where I'm fighting every day to fix our broken government.

I want to hear what's on your mind. _How are things going? Are you satisfied with the direction our country is heading? What would you change?_ These are all important questions that I would like to hear your opinion on.

name: Sharice Davids
subject: We just won Round One. But Round Two is just around the corner.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
After weeks of secret partisan maneuvering and shady backroom deals, Kansas Republicans just hit a MAJOR roadblock..

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118724055/580683679/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGJlNGJiYy03NGJhLWYwMTEtOGU2MS0wMDIyNDgyNGUwOGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GvVojmLe4pTdPea7rQGyAjYDSlg0NuUBWQnu7HWhbj8=) I wanted you to hear it from me first: **We just won the first round in this gerrymandering fight. But round two is just around the corner.** After weeks of secret partisan maneuvering and shady backroom deals, Kansas Republicans failed to gather the necessary signatures to force a special legislative session on redistricting. Our grassroots campaign is having an impact. **However, it’s likely they’ll make another attempt to gerrymander Kansas during the regular legislative session that begins in January.** The Kansas House Speaker even made an explicit promise: Republicans will continue the “conversation about redistricting.” Look, this is a big victory for the people of Kansas, and our democracy as a whole. But it could turn into a _temporary_ victory if we don’t spend every second between now and January keeping up the hard work. [_**Their plan to cheat the system isn’t over — so we can’t slow down either. Please, can you chip in just a few dollars to help us keep up the pressure campaign all the way through the new year? We need every ounce of grassroots support we can get if we want to spook Kansas Republicans off once again.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118724056/580683680/-46554286?refcode=email_110525_roundtwo&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGJlNGJiYy03NGJhLWYwMTEtOGU2MS0wMDIyNDgyNGUwOGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GvVojmLe4pTdPea7rQGyAjYDSlg0NuUBWQnu7HWhbj8=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118724057/580683681/-46554286?refcode=email_110525_roundtwo&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGJlNGJiYy03NGJhLWYwMTEtOGU2MS0wMDIyNDgyNGUwOGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GvVojmLe4pTdPea7rQGyAjYDSlg0NuUBWQnu7HWhbj8=)
---
For weeks, Republican legislators were circulating a petition to call for a special session. The sole purpose of that special session? Gerrymandering Kansas’ maps by splitting up Johnson County — something Republicans promised to _never_ do during their last gerrymandering push in 2021.
After that gerrymander, which was designed to make Kansas’ 3rd as Republican-friendly as possible, Republicans thought they had my number. The former Senate Majority Leader even said at the time: _“I guarantee you we can draw four Republican congressional maps.”_
**But they were wrong. In the next election, I won by _even more._**
Kansas Republicans have made it clear they’ll do anything to hold onto power — even silencing their own constituents at the ballot box. But I’ve been just as clear: **Voters should choose their representatives, not the other way around.**
[_**Stopping this special session is a moment for celebration — but that’s all it is: A moment. We can’t lose our focus now, not when we’re so close to ending this gerrymandering push for good. Please, chip in whatever you can to keep our campaign prepared for everything that comes our way.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118724058/580683682/-46554286?refcode=email_110525_roundtwo&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGJlNGJiYy03NGJhLWYwMTEtOGU2MS0wMDIyNDgyNGUwOGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GvVojmLe4pTdPea7rQGyAjYDSlg0NuUBWQnu7HWhbj8=)

name: Survey Team via Our Revolution
subject: After Zohran’s win, we want to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

The voters have spoken loud and clear.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34580?source=email-20251105&t=1011&akid=9787%2E5885482%2E_EVRhi ]Headline: Mamdani wins New York City mayoral race, in a historic victory for
progressives

Zohran Mamdani ran and won on ideas New Yorkers – and all Americans – are
hungry for: Affordable housing, childcare, and transportation, as well as
good-paying union jobs. These aren’t pie-in-the-sky policies. They’re
concrete, popular measures that will raise the standard of living for
everyday people right now. That’s why turnout soared, with young and
first-time voters lining up to make their voices heard.

But establishment Democrats aren’t seeing or feeling the momentum. In
fact, top party leaders are in denial. When asked if Mamdani was the
future of the Democratic Party, Hakeem Jeffries was quick to reply: “No.”
Chuck Schumer refused to endorse him, and even refused to answer when
asked if he voted for the Democratic nominee. This isn’t leadership – this
is a fundamental disconnect, plain and simple.

As we pivot to the 2026 midterms, we want to hear from Our Revolution
supporters so we can tell Democratic leaders the lessons that the
grassroots thinks they should learn from Mamdani’s historic victory. It
will also help us influence what candidates run on during the 2026
midterms. Can you take a quick minute to fill out this survey and tell us
where you stand? Here’s the first question:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34580?source=email-20251105&t=1012&akid=9787%2E5885482%2E_EVRhi ]Do you think Chuck Schumer should step aside as Democratic Senate
Minority Leader after failing to endorse Mamdani?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34580?source=email-20251105&t=1013&akid=9787%2E5885482%2E_EVRhi ]YES

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34580?source=email-20251105&t=1014&akid=9787%2E5885482%2E_EVRhi ]NO

Yesterday’s election sent an unmistakable message: bold, progressive ideas
fire up the grassroots. Yet time after time, the Democratic Establishment
turns its back on progressive candidates.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34580?source=email-20251105&t=1015&akid=9787%2E5885482%2E_EVRhi ]Headline: Is Mamdani the future of the Democratic Party? Rep. Hakeem Jeffries
says 'no.'

What’s happening is clear: as Trump’s authoritarianism reaches new
heights, Democratic leaders are doubling down on the same, tired playbook
– ignoring grassroots energy and voters hungry for real change.

Our Revolution was built to challenge business as usual inside the
Democratic Party. If we don’t speak up now, the party will never change –
and that will hurt us as we pivot to the 2026 elections. YOUR input
matters. Your perspective can shape where our movement goes from here.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34580?source=email-20251105&t=1016&akid=9787%2E5885482%2E_EVRhi ]Your responses will help inform our strategy as we get ready for
critical 2026 elections. When you fill out this quick survey on the future
of the Democratic Party, you will help our movement tell Democratic
leaders and 2026 candidates the best way to fight back against Trump and
win.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34580?source=email-20251105&t=1017&akid=9787%2E5885482%2E_EVRhi ]TAKE THE SURVEY

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=9787%2E5885482%2E_EVRhi ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=9787%2E5885482%2E_EVRhi ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=9787%2E5885482%2E_EVRhi ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=9787%2E5885482%2E_EVRhi ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=9787%2E5885482%2E_EVRhi ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=9787%2E5885482%2E_EVRhi ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20251105.DK8nbE&t=1007&akid=9787%2E5885482%2E_EVRhi ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20251105.qQ3_G2&t=1008&akid=9787%2E5885482%2E_EVRhi ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20251105.H89Pvv&t=1009&akid=9787%2E5885482%2E_EVRhi ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20251105.BoLYNZ&t=1010&akid=9787%2E5885482%2E_EVRhi ]GIVE ONCE

name: Seth Moulton
subject: Two big wins — and what comes next
body:
Spanberger and Sherrill just showed how Democrats win tough races.

| |
---
Friend, Last night, Democrats made history. Abigail Spanberger became the first woman ever elected Governor of Virginia — and Mikie Sherrill became the Governor-elect of New Jersey! I could not be prouder of them both. They embody what public service should look like: mission first, people first, results first. These victories are a reminder of what’s possible when we elevate leaders who have served our country and know how to do the hard work to deliver for their communities. I was proud to be among the first to endorse Abigail and Mikie in 2018, and to work alongside them in Congress in the years that followed. And here’s the part most people don’t realize: Democrats don’t win these races by accident. They win because we do the work to find incredible public servants early — and help them break through. That’s been my work through [Serve America](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118724253/580684426/-803653937?v=88yjagTmjjw&refcode=251105_sm_election&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTEzNGI0OS03NWJhLWYwMTEtOGU2MS0wMDIyNDgyNGUwOGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f-pph-DBsvs4_7OvRroOEpPbVS2wn1beyRLL6efLjZs=&emci=968decb5-56ba-f011-8e61-00224824e08d&emdi=5a134b49-75ba-f011-8e61-00224824e08d&ceid=194769) for years. We’ve helped flip more than two dozen seats from red to blue, and we’ve helped elect leaders who deliver for their communities every single day. This is exactly why I’m running for the United States Senate. Massachusetts — and America — deserve leaders who show up, solve real problems, and build a bench of Democrats who can win tough races and make real progress. But I can’t do this alone. And the first 30 days of this race will set the tone of this primary. clean_body: Spanberger and Sherrill just showed how Democrats win tough races. | | Friend, Last night, Democrats made history. Abigail Spanberger became the first woman ever elected Governor of Virginia — and Mikie Sherrill became the Governor-elect of New Jersey! I could not be prouder of them both. They embody what public service should look like: mission first, people first, results first. These victories are a reminder of what’s possible when we elevate leaders who have served our country and know how to do the hard work to deliver for their communities. I was proud to be among the first to endorse Abigail and Mikie in 2018, and to work alongside them in Congress in the years that followed. And here’s the part most people don’t realize: Democrats don’t win these races by accident. They win because we do the work to find incredible public servants early — and help them break through. That’s been my work through for years. We’ve helped flip more than two dozen seats from red to blue, and we’ve helped elect leaders who deliver for their communities every single day. This is exactly why I’m running for the United States Senate. Massachusetts — and America — deserve leaders who show up, solve real problems, and build a bench of Democrats who can win tough races and make real progress. But I can’t do this alone. # CNN Liberals are shocked when a communist firebrand acts like one
Fresh off his stunning upset victory in the 2025 NYC mayoral race, Democratic socialist Zohran Mamdani unleashed a roaring, unapologetic victory speech Tuesday night, slamming President Trump and claiming a bold mandate for change--prompting CNN's Van Jones to decry the young mayor-elect's **["instant character switch"](https://substack.com/redirect/e3a06d88-145b-4577-8b7c-a424fab745c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** from campaign trail warmth to aggressive firebrand.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e3a06d88-145b-4577-8b7c-a424fab745c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Victory Marks Historic Milestone:** Mamdani, 34, becomes NYC's first Muslim, South Asian, and socialist mayor, edging out Andrew Cuomo 50.4% to 42% in a race that ended the Cuomo dynasty.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ded061e6-fe37-4b29-b8c1-6caa43a9ec4a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Speech Signals Policy Boldness:** In a 20-minute address, Mamdani taunted Trump while vowing transformative reforms, including affordable governance and budget-heavy progressive initiatives that will strain the city's finances.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0f35306a-3cf2-4ebd-a372-234893b6e824?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Jones Highlights Tone Clash:** CNN's Jones lamented Mamdani's shift from "calm, warm" TikTok persona to a "sharp" yelling style, warning it alienated potential allies and missed a key chance for inclusivity.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e3a06d88-145b-4577-8b7c-a424fab745c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
* * *
**[Together with Nutrition and Healing](https://substack.com/redirect/9c87d16a-af44-4319-9188-f70b0e379db9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# [You won't see ](https://substack.com/redirect/9c87d16a-af44-4319-9188-f70b0e379db9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/9c87d16a-af44-4319-9188-f70b0e379db9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ in any history book...](https://substack.com/redirect/9c87d16a-af44-4319-9188-f70b0e379db9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9c87d16a-af44-4319-9188-f70b0e379db9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
But after becoming the first man to set foot on the moon...

Neil Armstrong reported a **[strange encounter](https://substack.com/redirect/9c87d16a-af44-4319-9188-f70b0e379db9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** he had in space during a post-mission debrief.And he wasn't the only astronaut to experience it.

NASA did their best to keep it secret...But now, unearthed **[NASA audio](https://substack.com/redirect/9c87d16a-af44-4319-9188-f70b0e379db9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** is blowing the lid off of everything.

**[This official Apollo recording](https://substack.com/redirect/9c87d16a-af44-4319-9188-f70b0e379db9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** is only seconds long, but it will chill you to the bone.

P.S. Of all the moon landing conspiracies, **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/9c87d16a-af44-4319-9188-f70b0e379db9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** could be the most incredible. Get the full truth **[HERE](https://substack.com/redirect/9c87d16a-af44-4319-9188-f70b0e379db9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** now while it's still publicly available.
[Watch the video here](https://substack.com/redirect/9c87d16a-af44-4319-9188-f70b0e379db9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
# Trump's Tariffs go before the Supreme Court
The Supreme Court dove into heated oral arguments Wednesday over President Donald Trump's sweeping **[tariffs on global imports](https://substack.com/redirect/c17a1ff9-afb1-4ea7-9452-b99047079436?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , pitting executive power against congressional authority in a case that could unleash $3 trillion in revenue or trigger massive refunds for U.S. businesses reeling from higher costs.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c17a1ff9-afb1-4ea7-9452-b99047079436?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Tariffs Target Key Imports** : Baseline 10% duties hit goods from most nations, surging to 50% on items from India and Brazil, plus fentanyl-linked penalties on Canada, China, and Mexico.
* **Revenue Boom Projected** : Policies could yield $3 trillion by 2035, with customs duties already up nearly 300% in late 2025, amassing $151 billion versus the previous year.
* **Refund Risk Looms Large** : Treasury warns of $750 billion-plus in potential repayments if tariffs are invalidated, especially with delayed rulings until summer.
* **Executive Overreach Debated** : Trump hails tariffs for boosting markets and security; critics decry consumer burdens, demanding Congress reclaim trade reins.

* * *
* * *
# Horror in Kentucky as UPS plane crash kills at least 9
A UPS cargo jet **[erupted into a massive fireball](https://substack.com/redirect/fe0233d2-3b1f-43c3-9dc9-f9c282b51a0b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** moments after takeoff from Louisville's Muhammad Ali International Airport on Tuesday evening, killing at least nine people and injuring 11 others, with Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear warning the toll could climb amid a frantic emergency response near the company's vast Worldport hub.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/91400913-3c79-4514-9bca-6cb31f921f4f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Crew Status Unknown Amid Chaos** : The MD-11F freighter carried just three crew members who are feared dead, while the crash site's debris-strewn wreckage and thick black smoke forced an immediate shelter-in-place for nearby residents and businesses.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a0f680ef-a60a-47a9-a23f-112eaa86f167?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Airport Shuts Down Operations** : Louisville's key UPS hub, handling hundreds of daily flights, closed temporarily before reopening one runway Wednesday, sparking widespread delays..
* **NTSB Launches Urgent Probe** : Federal investigators from the National Transportation Safety Board rushed to the scene to unravel the mystery of the fuel-laden plane's sudden plunge. No immediate cause of the crash has been identified yet for the Hawaii-bound plane.
* **Community Braces for Aftermath** : As UPS halted sorting at its massive facility in this "UPS town," Gov. Beshear called for prayers and support, highlighting potential environmental risks from adjacent industrial sites though no hazmat threats were confirmed.

* * *
* * *
# Ripple surges as Bitcoin falters, $500m investment boosts its value to $40B
In a bold vote of confidence amid crypto's latest tumble, fintech powerhouse Ripple **[soared to a $40 billion valuation Wednesday](https://substack.com/redirect/ffea0531-511d-4994-b888-d3926ba55876?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after securing $500 million in fresh funding, fueling its aggressive expansion into cross boarder payments with XRP, stablecoins with RLUSD and custody services.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ffea0531-511d-4994-b888-d3926ba55876?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Funding Led by Titans** : Heavyweight investors including Fortress, Citadel Securities, Pantera Capital, Galaxy Digital, Brevan Howard, and Marshall Wace spearheaded the $500 million equity infusion, signaling deep trust in Ripple's institutional pivot.
* **Regulatory Tailwinds Boost** : Post-Trump's election and the passage of the GENIUS Act has created a friendlier U.S. climate towards crypto currency, which has propelled the deal. The deal will enable Ripple to capitalize on stablecoin innovations and global partnerships amid market volatility.
* **Acquisition Spree Accelerates** : Over two years, Ripple snapped up six firms, to fortify payment structure as well as venture into crypto custody, prime brokerage, and treasury management for big clients.
* **Growth Amid Bitcoin Dip** : Despite Bitcoin plunging below $100,000 yesterday and erasing billions market-wide, the capital from this deal armors Ripple's "record year" trajectory, blending utility crypto tech with traditional finance for cross-border global dominance.

* * *
* * *
# **Dallas is rapidly (and quietly) becoming the Wall Street of the West**
In a seismic shift from New York's storied skyline, Wall Street titans like JPMorgan Chase and Goldman Sachs are **[quietly fleeing to Texas](https://substack.com/redirect/6b1eec4a-6335-455b-ae57-2332cff910e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **lured by lower taxes and more business friendly regulations amid a post-COVID exodus, as well as **[the hard tilt left in New York's politics](https://substack.com/redirect/14ce8471-bec7-430c-ab57-0c42f158751e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6b1eec4a-6335-455b-ae57-2332cff910e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **JPMorgan Outnumbers NYC Workforce:** JPMorgan Chase now employs more Texans than New Yorkers, boasting 31,000 Texas employees--surpassing its 24,000 in New York--fueled by a massive Plano campus anchoring 18,000 in the Dallas-Fort Worth area.
* **Goldman Sachs Builds Mega-Campus:** Goldman Sachs is erecting an 800,000-square-foot Dallas facility for over 5,000 workers, opening in 2028 and expanding its current 4,500-strong local presence across divisions.
* **Wells Fargo Unveils Sprawling Site:** Wells Fargo's new 22-acre Dallas campus, with twin 10-story towers, debuted in September to house up to 4,500 employees, boosting its 5,000-9,999 metro workforce.
* **Schwab Relocates HQ to Texas:** Charles Schwab shifted its headquarters from California to Westlake five years ago, solidifying 5,000-9,999 Dallas jobs amid the state's business-friendly surge.

* * *

body:

#
Democrats won statewide in Georgia.
Democrat Abigail Spanberger flipped Virginia.
Democrat Mikie Sherrill held strong in New Jersey.
Democrat Zohran Mamdani made history in New York City.
Democrats in California successfully fought back against the GOP power grab.
**We saw a clean sweep for Democrats yesterday, Peter.[Now, we’re counting on your help to build on this momentum for Democrats who are running in competitive races in 2026. Will you rush a donation of $5 or whatever amount works best for you today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97373?refcode=em20251105-9674&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9674%2E614464%2EqHRug8)**

body:
Abigail Spanberger and Mikie Sherrill were just elected.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=5507%2E400544%2E1y3WrE)
This is a BIG deal:
**In Virginia and New Jersey, Abigail Spanberger and Mikie Sherrill just became the first Democratic women elected governors in their states!**
Deb, Abigail, and Mikie were all part of that fierce class of women elected to Congress in 2018. Together, they stood up to Trump, fought for working families, and showed what it means to lead with courage when it mattered most.
**Now it’s our turn to make history:**
_By electing Deb as the next Governor of New Mexico and the first Native American woman governor in U.S. history._
**[We’re officially one year out from Election Day, and every ounce of grassroots energy will help us build the momentum we need to win. name: EMILYs List
subject: Women are at the center of the fight to take back power
body:
What last night's wins mean |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118725451/580688874/-1510725204?sourceid=1057305&refcode=WUEFEK14_20251105_EDayRR_PL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjM1NzViOC03OGJhLWYwMTEtOGU2MS0wMDIyNDgyNGUwOGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hrsrfcpy1N_m1MQbKCQclKMPq7jbnVfwyfraMvuZnuo=) Peter, it was a CLEAN SWEEP for EMILYs List women last night.

That's right — _out of 20 Democratic pro-choice women we endorsed in November's elections, 18 won outright, and two advanced to runoffs_.

**Last night's results prove that Democratic pro-choice women are at the center of the fight to take back power:**
* EMILYs List women secured a Democratic trifecta in Virginia — with **Abigail Spanberger** as governor, **Ghazala Hashmi** as lieutenant governor, and our **TEN House of Delegates candidates** flipping Republican seats.

* **Mikie Sherrill** won a hard-fought race to become New Jersey's next governor, defeat her MAGA Republican opponent, and address the challenges facing her community.

* **Justice Christine Donohue** retained her seat on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court — helping to hold the court's progressive majority for years to come.

* **Amanda Edwards** is advancing to a runoff in the special election for Texas' 18th Congressional District. She's on track to secure a critical blue seat in our fight to take back the U.S. House.

* And in cities across the country, voters elected **Democratic pro-choice women mayors** to lead their cities forward.

These women are powerful models of what it looks like to run and win in tough races, and we're proud to stand by them.

**Our 2025 victories give us a blueprint for our fight to take back power in 2026 and beyond, and we're already knee-deep in recruiting and preparing the women best equipped to battle out those wins. **

[**Right now, we need to know you're with us — not just on Election Day, but every day of this fight. clean_body: What last night's wins mean | = Peter, it was a CLEAN SWEEP for EMILYs List women last night. That's right — out of 20 Democratic pro-choice women we endorsed in November's elections, 18 won outright, and two advanced to runoffs. Last night's results prove that Democratic pro-choice women are at the center of the fight to take back power: EMILYs List women secured a Democratic trifecta in Virginia — with Abigail Spanberger as governor, Ghazala Hashmi as lieutenant governor, and our TEN House of Delegates candidates flipping Republican seats. Mikie Sherrill won a hard-fought race to become New Jersey's next governor, defeat her MAGA Republican opponent, and address the challenges facing her community. Justice Christine Donohue retained her seat on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court — helping to hold the court's progressive majority for years to come. Amanda Edwards is advancing to a runoff in the special election for Texas' 18th Congressional District. She's on track to secure a critical blue seat in our fight to take back the U.S. House. And in cities across the country, voters elected Democratic pro-choice women mayors to lead their cities forward. These women are powerful models of what it looks like to run and win in tough races, and we're proud to stand by them. Our 2025 victories give us a blueprint for our fight to take back power in 2026 and beyond, and we're already knee-deep in recruiting and preparing the women best equipped to battle out those wins. ** = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, the EMILYs List team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? subject: Snap poll: Department of Justice

body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
You are invited to join our one-click issue response poll.
For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
Leading voting rights lawyer Marc Elias recently wrote: " The Department of Justice no longer represents the best interests of the American people. Under [Pam] Bondi, it has been transformed into little more than a cog in the authoritarian machine doing Donald Trump’s bidding. It has abandoned independent judgment and fealty to the law and replaced it with unquestioned obedience to the White House. After only [a few] months in office, Trump has transformed the Department of Justice into an instrument for voter suppression. "
Team: We're looking to hear from our supporters about the changes at DOJ. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Do you agree with the changes Trump is making at the Department of Justice?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=110525_2yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=110525_2no&amount=15]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=110525_2&amount=20]

| | **The truth they want to hide could destroy lives.**
---
