name: Katie Porter
subject: What a night!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
This is how we win back voters we’ve lost, and build the movement we need to pass bold policies.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40367%2E3422442%2EK_ss1A)
Wow, what a night, Peter!
From California to the East Coast, Democrats won big in yesterday’s elections.
Here in California, voters overwhelmingly passed Proposition 50. Millions of Californians showed up to reject Trump’s extreme gerrymander of the House of Representatives. The people want to use our power to hold Trump accountable to democracy.
We also elected powerful, courageous women governors: Abigail Spanberger in Virginia and Mikie Sherrill in New Jersey. Both ran on lowering costs and standing up to Trump, and guess what? _Voters elected them with a mandate for change._
Now, we have to build on this momentum.
**I’m running for governor of California to keep last night’s energy going.** My agenda is similar to what so many of the change makers who won last night campaigned on: lowering costs, protecting our health care, and defending our rights when the federal government attacks them. This is how we win back voters we’ve lost, and build the movement we need to pass bold policies.
Yesterday, Senator Padilla announced that he would continue to fight for Californians in the Senate and would not be running for governor. With our primary election coming up fast, I need your help to stay the Democratic frontrunner.
**[I’m going to be celebrating our wins with you today, but we have to recommit to getting back in the fight right away. Can you chip in $5 to our campaign today to keep last night’s election energy going into 2026 and beyond?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251105_1_ak.rIh45M&refcode=em20251105-40367&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40367%2E3422442%2EK_ss1A)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251105_1_ak.rIh45M&refcode=em20251105-40367&t=22&akid=40367%2E3422442%2EK_ss1A)
Thank you,
Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251105-40367&amounts=&t=23&refcode2=40367_3422442_K_ss1A&akid=40367%2E3422442%2EK_ss1A)**

name: Lauren Groh-Wargo, Fair Fight
subject: Last night, voters sent a clear message, from Georgia to California
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
Americans are fed up with Trump’s GOP, and we need to make the most of this moment. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118738892/580734166/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20251105_T1_ElectionResultsRR_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmMwNTJiMS05Y2JhLWYwMTEtOGU2MS0wMDIyNDgyNGUwOGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cUv8vm_Nj32ZuHo1I446LX8MQXJetpRwKXTxnV0MwTQ=&emci=4c74649b-96ba-f011-8e61-00224824e08d&emdi=72c052b1-9cba-f011-8e61-00224824e08d&ceid=1037277)

| | Team, I want to make sure we celebrate yesterday’s phenomenal election results, including some hugely significant under-the-radar victories:
* **In Georgia:** Democrats flipped **two** statewide offices with Dr. Alicia Johnson and Peter Hubbard getting elected to our state’s Public Service Commission. At Fair Fight, we were proud to endorse them — they even won in a county _where Republicans usually get 60% of the vote._
* **In Mississippi:** Democrats won historic victories, breaking the GOP supermajority in the State Senate and ending the State House’s effective-supermajority. We’ve got to keep winning state legislative races like these as the GOP works state-by-state to rig our democracy in their favor — especially since the Supreme Court may be about to set off a wave of state-by-state racially discriminatory redistricting.
* **In California:** Voters overwhelmingly passed Proposition 50, a ballot initiative to launch a redistricting process that fights back against Republican map-rigging. This is critical, with states like Texas, Missouri, and North Carolina having already rigged their maps to appease Trump and tilt the scales in favor of the GOP.

We’ll have more to share soon on the wins that you helped make possible. As for the work ahead, it’s clear now that Americans are fed up with how Donald Trump and the GOP are running this country — and their anti-democracy extremism. We need to make the most of this momentum, [**and this team can help seize new opportunities to elect candidates who will protect our democracy — in red states, purple states, and blue states — and deliver free and fair elections.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118738893/580734167/-413138639?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20251105_T1_ElectionResultsRR_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmMwNTJiMS05Y2JhLWYwMTEtOGU2MS0wMDIyNDgyNGUwOGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cUv8vm_Nj32ZuHo1I446LX8MQXJetpRwKXTxnV0MwTQ=) Here’s another critical takeaway: **based on last night, Trump and his allies know their party will lose in 2026 if the elections are fair, so they’re rushing to rig the system.** They’re scrambling to redraw the maps, block fair representation, and weaken our votes. This is a coordinated GOP power grab — not politics as usual. And we have to respond with everything we’ve got. **At Fair Fight, we’ll continue working to win the local, state, and federal races that can make the greatest impact to ensure free and fair elections. And we’ll continue defending the freedom to vote.** [**As we stare down even more races in 2026, make a donation of $30 or any amount right now to keep up the fight for our democracy — because last night showed that we have a path to victory, as long as we march side by side.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118738894/580734168/-413138639?amount=30&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20251105_T1_ElectionResultsRR_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmMwNTJiMS05Y2JhLWYwMTEtOGU2MS0wMDIyNDgyNGUwOGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cUv8vm_Nj32ZuHo1I446LX8MQXJetpRwKXTxnV0MwTQ=) _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ | [Chip in $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118738895/580734169/-413138639?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20251105_T1_ElectionResultsRR_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmMwNTJiMS05Y2JhLWYwMTEtOGU2MS0wMDIyNDgyNGUwOGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cUv8vm_Nj32ZuHo1I446LX8MQXJetpRwKXTxnV0MwTQ=) | [Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118738896/580734170/-413138639?amount=25&express_lane=true&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20251105_T1_ElectionResultsRR_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmMwNTJiMS05Y2JhLWYwMTEtOGU2MS0wMDIyNDgyNGUwOGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cUv8vm_Nj32ZuHo1I446LX8MQXJetpRwKXTxnV0MwTQ=)

clean_body: Americans are fed up with Trump’s GOP, and we need to make the most of this moment. | | | Team, I want to make sure we celebrate yesterday’s phenomenal election results, including some hugely significant under-the-radar victories: In Georgia: Democrats flipped two statewide offices with Dr. Alicia Johnson and Peter Hubbard getting elected to our state’s Public Service Commission. At Fair Fight, we were proud to endorse them — they even won in a county where Republicans usually get 60% of the vote. In Mississippi: Democrats won historic victories, breaking the GOP supermajority in the State Senate and ending the State House’s effective-supermajority. We’ve got to keep winning state legislative races like these as the GOP works state-by-state to rig our democracy in their favor — especially since the Supreme Court may be about to set off a wave of state-by-state racially discriminatory redistricting. In California: Voters overwhelmingly passed Proposition 50, a ballot initiative to launch a redistricting process that fights back against Republican map-rigging. This is critical, with states like Texas, Missouri, and North Carolina having already rigged their maps to appease Trump and tilt the scales in favor of the GOP. We’ll have more to share soon on the wins that you helped make possible. As for the work ahead, it’s clear now that Americans are fed up with how Donald Trump and the GOP are running this country — and their anti-democracy extremism. We need to make the most of this momentum, = Here’s another critical takeaway: based on last night, Trump and his allies know their party will lose in 2026 if the elections are fair, so they’re rushing to rig the system. They’re scrambling to redraw the maps, block fair representation, and weaken our votes. This is a coordinated GOP power grab — not politics as usual. And we have to respond with everything we’ve got. At Fair Fight, we’ll continue working to win the local, state, and federal races that can make the greatest impact to ensure free and fair elections. Dear Reader,
RFK Jr is preparing to drop a political _**BOMBSHELL**_ in 2025...

And liberals are _**FURIOUS**_.
But that's only the beginning...
RFK Jr is also warning Americans about a **[brand-new threat](https://substack.com/redirect/0869657e-f13a-4eef-87d5-1c2bb1c7f275?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that could be even deadlier...
And if you were born on or before January 1st, 1965, then you're most at risk.
Liberals in Congress are doing everything to undermine the truth...
But the stunning data he's compiled will chill you to the bone.
**[Get the full facts here](https://substack.com/redirect/0869657e-f13a-4eef-87d5-1c2bb1c7f275?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** while it's still available online.

P.S. I'll be blunt, if you're over the age of 60 then the RFK Jr warning exposed in this video will make you angry... but it could also save your life. **[Watch it here now](https://substack.com/redirect/0869657e-f13a-4eef-87d5-1c2bb1c7f275?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** while it's still available online.

### _More news:_
# **Jewish NYC fire commissioner resigns day after Mamdani election**
New York City Fire Commissioner Robert Tucker, a Jewish philanthropist and businessman, **[handed in his resignation](https://substack.com/redirect/c75b15cc-aefe-4665-b60a-fadf03011980?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Wednesday--just one day after anti-Israel Mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani was elected--ending his 12-month tenure with an effective date of December 19.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c75b15cc-aefe-4665-b60a-fadf03011980?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Returning to private security firm:** Tucker will return to running T&M, the private security firm he founded in 1999 and headed before joining Mayor Eric Adams' administration in August 2024 as the FDNY's 35th commissioner, replacing Laura Kavanagh after her tumultuous tenure.
* **Resignation timing notable but reasons unclear:** News of Tucker's resignation came just as he was set to fly to Israel to meet with a fire commissioner in the Jewish state, though his specific reasons for stepping down were not immediately clear, with The Post reaching out for comment.
* **Strong Jewish ties and community involvement:** Tucker's Jewish faith was evident when his father held a copy of the Tanach--the Hebrew bible used for his bar mitzvah--at his swearing-in ceremony, and he has been involved in various charitable endeavors including serving as secretary of the FDNY Foundation and receiving honors from the New York Board of Rabbis.

* * *
# **Bernie Sanders criticizes party leadership at Schumer press conference**
Sen. Bernie Sanders **[interrupted Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer's post-election news conference](https://substack.com/redirect/9f8a7456-eb16-4c11-a1dc-65ba445a8ec9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Wednesday to criticize Democratic Party leadership for not supporting mayoral candidate Zohran Mamdani in New York and Senate hopeful Graham Platner in Maine, saying "defending the status quo and the inequalities that exist in America, is not where the American people are."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/663391d1-9198-4879-acf7-d244c5be18c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Democrats celebrate election victories during record shutdown:** The comments came as Democrats touted election wins including Mamdani's mayoral victory in New York City and Mikie Sherrill's New Jersey governorship, with Schumer blasting Republicans as the government shutdown entered its 36th day--the longest in U.S. history--calling it "a five-alarm fire" showing "the American people said enough is enough."
* **Healthcare and SNAP funding remain unresolved:** Schumer and House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries demanded President Trump meet with them to discuss healthcare issues as Democrats urge Republicans to address surging health insurance premiums tied to expired Affordable Care Act subsidies and lapsed SNAP funding, with Congress yet to reach an agreement despite several proposed GOP stopgap measures.

* * *
# **Transport Sec. announces 10% capacity reduction at 40 airports**
Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy **[announced Wednesday](https://substack.com/redirect/5cfb1bfb-37fd-4a82-b0fb-16c45315dd3f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that airspace restrictions will reduce capacity by 10% at 40 locations starting Friday, impacting roughly 4,000 flights nationwide, with the list of affected airports to be released Thursday due to mounting FAA staffing shortages and safety concerns.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5cfb1bfb-37fd-4a82-b0fb-16c45315dd3f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Record 36-day shutdown creates staffing crisis:** The federal government shutdown entered its 36th day Wednesday, making it the longest in U.S. history, with thousands of aviation workers including 13,000 air traffic controllers and 50,000 TSA officers continuing to work without pay since October 1, causing staffing levels to drop and increasing pressure on the national airspace system.
* **Duffy warns of potential airspace closure:** Secretary Duffy previously warned Monday that the Trump administration would shut down the U.S. aviation system if the ongoing government shutdown made travel too risky, and may be forced to delay or cancel flights or close portions of U.S. airspace if the staffing crisis deepens.
* **Major delays already affecting travel:** On October 31, the FAA reported nearly half of the 30 busiest U.S. airports faced air traffic controller shortages, resulting in over 6,200 delayed flights and 500 cancellations, with Duffy expressing concern that unpaid workers who are "head of household" with families are confronting "real-world difficulties" paying bills but urging them not to take side jobs.

More headlines below! | | ---|---|--- Dear Reader, RFK Jr is preparing to drop a political BOMBSHELL in 2025... His handpicked panel of CDC vaccine experts are finally going to EXPOSE the truth behind the COVID jab. And liberals are FURIOUS. But that's only the beginning... RFK Jr is also warning Americans about a that could be even deadlier... And if you were born on or before January 1st, 1965, then you're most at risk. Liberals in Congress are doing everything to undermine the truth... But the stunning data he's compiled will chill you to the bone. while it's still available online. P.S. I'll be blunt, if you're over the age of 60 then the RFK Jr warning exposed in this video will make you angry... but it could also save your life. while it's still available online. More news: Jewish NYC fire commissioner resigns day after Mamdani election New York City Fire Commissioner Robert Tucker, a Jewish philanthropist and businessman, Wednesday--just one day after anti-Israel Mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani was elected--ending his 12-month tenure with an effective date of December 19. | | ---|---|--- Returning to private security firm: Tucker will return to running T&M, the private security firm he founded in 1999 and headed before joining Mayor Eric Adams' administration in August 2024 as the FDNY's 35th commissioner, replacing Laura Kavanagh after her tumultuous tenure. Resignation timing notable but reasons unclear: News of Tucker's resignation came just as he was set to fly to Israel to meet with a fire commissioner in the Jewish state, though his specific reasons for stepping down were not immediately clear, with The Post reaching out for comment. Strong Jewish ties and community involvement: Tucker's Jewish faith was evident when his father held a copy of the Tanach--the Hebrew bible used for his bar mitzvah--at his swearing-in ceremony, and he has been involved in various charitable endeavors including serving as secretary of the FDNY Foundation and receiving honors from the New York Board of Rabbis. Bernie Sanders criticizes party leadership at Schumer press conference Sen. Bernie Sanders Wednesday to criticize Democratic Party leadership for not supporting mayoral candidate Zohran Mamdani in New York and Senate hopeful Graham Platner in Maine, saying "defending the status quo and the inequalities that exist in America, is not where the American people are." Democrats celebrate election victories during record shutdown: The comments came as Democrats touted election wins including Mamdani's mayoral victory in New York City and Mikie Sherrill's New Jersey governorship, with Schumer blasting Republicans as the government shutdown entered its 36th day--the longest in U.S. history--calling it "a five-alarm fire" showing "the American people said enough is enough." Healthcare and SNAP funding remain unresolved: Schumer and House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries demanded President Trump meet with them to discuss healthcare issues as Democrats urge Republicans to address surging health insurance premiums tied to expired Affordable Care Act subsidies and lapsed SNAP funding, with Congress yet to reach an agreement despite several proposed GOP stopgap measures. Transport Sec. announces 10% capacity reduction at 40 airports Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy that airspace restrictions will reduce capacity by 10% at 40 locations starting Friday, impacting roughly 4,000 flights nationwide, with the list of affected airports to be released Thursday due to mounting FAA staffing shortages and safety concerns. | | ---|---|--- Record 36-day shutdown creates staffing crisis: The federal government shutdown entered its 36th day Wednesday, making it the longest in U.S. history, with thousands of aviation workers including 13,000 air traffic controllers and 50,000 TSA officers continuing to work without pay since October 1, causing staffing levels to drop and increasing pressure on the national airspace system. Duffy warns of potential airspace closure: Secretary Duffy previously warned Monday that the Trump administration would shut down the U.S. aviation system if the ongoing government shutdown made travel too risky, and may be forced to delay or cancel flights or close portions of U.S. airspace if the staffing crisis deepens. Major delays already affecting travel: On October 31, the FAA reported nearly half of the 30 busiest U.S. airports faced air traffic controller shortages, resulting in over 6,200 delayed flights and 500 cancellations, with Duffy expressing concern that unpaid workers who are "head of household" with families are confronting "real-world difficulties" paying bills but urging them not to take side jobs. * You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Politibrawl 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Haley Stevens
subject: Big wins, good friends, and what comes next
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Michigan
body:
My friends won by fighting for working people

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oYWxleWZvcm1pLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.hUK1ZFbce_h2Xs2B8YiY8i8z5dLod0GRtXuEg5PVCdE?) for more
---
# [Big wins, good friends, and what comes next](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6380051&post_id=178128171&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4MTI4MTcxLCJpYXQiOjE3NjIzODUzNzIsImV4cCI6MTc2NDk3NzM3MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTYzODAwNTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.hUmDb4hyxQglxkdGTupHjCOI64bUDS8osLk16aCeIl0)
### My friends won by fighting for working people
| | [Haley Stevens](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---
| Nov 5
---
| [](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack..ZX6Kh930yZA66GCCIx2ynwhyB23ddqo7nxddErB3zdw?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/haleyformi/p/big-wins-good-friends-and-what-comes?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Happy post-Election Day!
I want to take a moment to say congratulations to two of my dear friends - Mikie Sherrill and Abigail Spanberger - who just made history in New Jersey and Virginia, winning their races for governor.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/51f9b4b8-af0c-4776-a105-d5bb963daca8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I've served alongside both of these remarkable women since we won our House seats in 2018 - part of a wave of strong, passionate women who ran for Congress and said enough to Trump's chaos. We entered the House together. We've shared late nights on the floor, long conversations about our home states, and more than a few laughs along the way.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/8d12454b-a550-43cc-b501-78adee188262?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And yesterday? I got to cheer them on as they became governors-elect.
It was emotional. It was hopeful. And it was a reminder that when you set out to fight for working people - good things happen.
Because here's the real takeaway from last night:
**Candidates who focus on lowering costs, their local communities, and actually listening to voters - they're the ones who win.**
That's what Mikie did. That's what Abigail did. And that's what I'm doing here in Michigan.
I'm showing up like Mikie and Abigail did. I'm fighting to protect manufacturing jobs. Working to lower the cost of health care and groceries and utilities. And building a coalition of local support in union halls, in factories, and at kitchen tables all across this state.
I'm celebrating these wins last night because they show us all what's possible. And if we can carry this momentum into 2026 - if we keep building - we'll win too.
But Michigan is a top target for Senate Republicans. I'm statistically tied with Trump's handpicked candidate, Mike Rogers - and the GOP has already raised over $5 million in dark money to turn Michigan red.
But what they have in cash, we have in people.
So if you're as fired up as I am, let's carry this momentum forward. Let's build something strong enough to win - and to deliver for working families across Michigan and this country.
**Will you chip in today to help keep Michigan blue and flip the Senate?**
[ Donate](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/4509e544-46b4-404c-8e79-446edc420d06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
We've got work to do. And I couldn't be more proud to do it with all of you.
With grit and gratitude,
Haley
* * *

A personal note from Haley 👋

I'm a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. I've spent my career fighting for Michigan's working families - and now I'm running for the U.S. Senate to keep standing up for the people I love.

But here's the truth: Senate control could come down to Michigan. And Trump and his megadonors know it. That's why they're gearing up to spend tens of millions to defeat me and hand this seat to a MAGA Republican.

I need your help to fight back. This race will be one of the most competitive - and expensive - in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots support to win.

If you're with me, will you chip in today?
[Donate](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/0a8731f1-a3f2-469a-ae34-b26d4344f3fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
###### Paid for by Haley Stevens for Michigan.

---
| | | [Restack](https://substack..ZX6Kh930yZA66GCCIx2ynwhyB23ddqo7nxddErB3zdw?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---

(C) 2025 Haley for MI
33717 Woodward Ave #539, Birmingham, MI 48009
[Unsubscribe](https://substack..XjcthHRAt8L3SUv2nsC--EBLuABAP2DdTPp6VpS5mvE?)
[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e879ad4d-ad69-4e88-a2e1-392e0a1bbd66?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[](https://substack..r65rHve0GSbTiJ3z3WkG8_jnH2_leFYiIRX2nXGbTZo?)

name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: The results say it all
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=Kbr8dFuIAWGF3TRBiQeNm%2FS6tjoAQp8H7YGvyQB%2FkakXJGh7UjNEacOEshuGEot%2FsLw4L9vxX64zpJrSleY25UUQpEgvkM4WBf4FoVUrV9thhjtKXkiJ8XbPwylofvEgOA37URnkBvK4SIh%2BF10pQQqpuXTM40zqpU3alk4u7%2BBRZytdGlQWdIvB3bLkTrNRalQnsODwzVuG0vBaLTPhH0gkd4FtM2XIPtg9pVKB7LcaINaG6LQl3SBteiSupzyXysRuKPj0bjUvAAWb4r3%2FGb9Ru6LNZOqimAtaI6pzPOP%2BZVkJ6lV1iOSJwyYrFlq6oqTxCG%2FvWSeQpkTGg7fcjtkssU%2FYfyWzHnFuG5ALkQSE%2Bs0piTZiM1tyGgYkL9ICtLPQmQx2B2RsjH883Q4XkExi8gUGSba62EeCxgVZiDBSUaae%2BW7A7iLlI2nPwOSj)
---
| |
---
What a night for California — and for our country. With the passage of Prop 50, voters across our state sent a powerful message: we see what’s happening across the nation, and we’re not standing by while Donald Trump and Republicans try to tighten their grip on power. Californians showed that when our democracy is tested, we rise to the occasion. And we weren’t alone. From coast to coast, voters stood up for progress, for decency, and for the future we believe in. The results nationwide make one thing clear — **momentum is on our side.** Just because Prop 50 passed doesn’t mean anything is guaranteed. The outcome WILL be close, and my race could decide who controls the House next November. Every ounce of energy we build now will shape the outcome. If we harness the momentum from last night and keep organizing, we can flip the House and stop the Republican power grab for good. [Every contribution helps us build on this momentum and carry the energy from last night into next year’s election. clean_body: While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | What a night for California — and for our country. With the passage of Prop 50, voters across our state sent a powerful message: we see what’s happening across the nation, and we’re not standing by while Donald Trump and Republicans try to tighten their grip on power. Californians showed that when our democracy is tested, we rise to the occasion. And we weren’t alone. From coast to coast, voters stood up for progress, for decency, and for the future we believe in. The results nationwide make one thing clear — momentum is on our side. Just because Prop 50 passed doesn’t mean anything is guaranteed. The outcome WILL be close, and my race could decide who controls the House next November. Every ounce of energy we build now will shape the outcome. If we harness the momentum from last night and keep organizing, we can flip the House and stop the Republican power grab for good. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Let’s keep fighting, keep building, and keep moving forward — together. name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: It’s pure corruption
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
How far will the Supreme Court let Trump go this time? | |
---
Peter, **Today, the Supreme Court heard oral arguments regarding Trump’s sweeping, executive tariff agenda.** Trump has been abusing his so-called “tariff powers” to punish his enemies and reward his friends—and he’s done all of it without Congressional approval. Tariffs have already altered the American economy, as corporations raise prices for all of us to keep up with the cost. **And with grocery costs, rent, and healthcare premiums rising, working people are being hit the hardest.** Meanwhile, Trump is exempting corporations who curry favor with him. He raised millions to demolish the East Wing of the White House from the same people who he exempted from his tariffs. **This is corruption, pure and simple.** Trump shouldn’t get to unilaterally reshape the American economy to serve his own ends. **The MAGA justices will have to twist themselves into knots if they want to side with Trump in this case.** If they green light his “emergency” tariffs, they’ll be reversing their own made-up reasoning in a Biden case from just two years ago. In that case, they said that Congress needed to weigh in. **This case should be more cut-and-dry than that—Trump’s sweeping tariff agenda is clearly an illegal exercise of executive power, and his “national emergency” only exists in his mind.** **But the MAGA justices on the Supreme Court have made it clear that they’re willing to enable Trump’s worst impulses and give him broad powers to do whatever he wants.** [**Our experts are monitoring the oral arguments closely, and we’re bringing our analysis back to activists like you across the country. We’re organizing the response to the Supreme Court at every step. Chip in today to power our efforts!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe6k1HsDub_o_gCgkaC5oDh_6wqcCTg0jxC747pM5xuXUhDMuW-sFdKqbTQDadSOyuBNZBXnlCa1ba1kKfnOQs-DjdNdr0x3589jlhs28Zj93reQQcPIJG2O8oPeMxNvB8S76tkiJkAj1rFYeeo2h9dJSSViKXtkvdeoDFTBl5ITaYjAkuX8v0Y2G79HtRB8s97Pff-l0IEME3ES1aEDxyEJUT9Su2J5Wu5NIPg5z_PYzJeAVGn_Zffo7X-uLEC9NOX3BbkCiSirYzuqgf-bkL_dg/4lc/X4UQ0jP2Tw6ILyoRjAvW7A/h0/h001.YcD6hI1ykLphhnsmOKVWQw0KuskbGA9rh48i7hQTgMU) Thank you for fighting back against executive overreach, Morgan Stahr
United for Democracy

name: Marlene
subject: about my mother
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118739874/580737487/-1882479441?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.05_Mom-Story_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjFiODNkNzItYTFiYS1mMDExLThlNjEtMDAyMjQ4MjRlMDhkIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=h3c7BCB2WoN2Agcjskc6QMRaUjg1cO2LXQSmCpLTqD0=)
---
When my parents fled communist Cuba, they came to America with nothing but hope. My mother left behind her family, her home, and her community, so that I could have a shot at the American dream. She worked long hours in a country she didn’t yet understand, just to put food on our table and give me the chance to learn, grow, and build a life of freedom and dignity. Every time I face a challenge, _I think of her_. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118739876/580737489/-423659337?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.05_Mom-Story_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjFiODNkNzItYTFiYS1mMDExLThlNjEtMDAyMjQ4MjRlMDhkIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=h3c7BCB2WoN2Agcjskc6QMRaUjg1cO2LXQSmCpLTqD0=) I think of how she refused to give up — how she believed that no matter where you start, America gives you the chance to rise. But today, that promise feels further out of reach for too many people. Republicans in Congress are making it harder for families to get ahead — harder to afford a home, harder to earn a living wage, harder to send our kids to good schools, and harder to believe that the system still works for people like us. I’m running to change that — to make sure every family has a fair shot at building a better future. To restore a sense of unity, dignity, and opportunity for all of us — no matter where we come from or how much money we make. **But I can’t do it alone.** This campaign isn’t powered by ultra-wealthy donors or political insiders. It’s powered by people like _you_. **[_If my mom’s story speaks to you — and if you believe in an America that lifts us up — will you chip in $5 or $15 to help us win this race for Congress in Arizona’s 1st district?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118739878/580737492/-423659337?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.05_Mom-Story_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjFiODNkNzItYTFiYS1mMDExLThlNjEtMDAyMjQ4MjRlMDhkIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=h3c7BCB2WoN2Agcjskc6QMRaUjg1cO2LXQSmCpLTqD0=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | ****[ CHIP IN $5 NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118739880/580737493/-423659337?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.05_Mom-Story_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjFiODNkNzItYTFiYS1mMDExLThlNjEtMDAyMjQ4MjRlMDhkIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=h3c7BCB2WoN2Agcjskc6QMRaUjg1cO2LXQSmCpLTqD0=)****

clean_body: | | = When my parents fled communist Cuba, they came to America with nothing but hope. My mother left behind her family, her home, and her community, so that I could have a shot at the American dream. She worked long hours in a country she didn’t yet understand, just to put food on our table and give me the chance to learn, grow, and build a life of freedom and dignity. Every time I face a challenge, I think of her. = I think of how she refused to give up — how she believed that no matter where you start, America gives you the chance to rise. But today, that promise feels further out of reach for too many people. Republicans in Congress are making it harder for families to get ahead — harder to afford a home, harder to earn a living wage, harder to send our kids to good schools, and harder to believe that the system still works for people like us. I’m running to change that — to make sure every family has a fair shot at building a better future. To restore a sense of unity, dignity, and opportunity for all of us — no matter where we come from or how much money we make. But I can’t do it alone. This campaign isn’t powered by ultra-wealthy donors or political insiders. It’s powered by people like you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | **= | = | = | = | =** | = From the bottom of my heart, thank you for believing in what’s possible. — Marlene Galán-Woods | To learn more about Marlene, visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS Marlene for Congress 7904 E. Chaparral Road, Suite A110-472 Scottsdale, AZ 85250 United States

Let’s keep up the momentum. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118740062/580737805/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzVlOTAzYmEtYTFiYS1mMDExLThlNjEtMDAyMjQ4MjRlMDhkIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-lZAwYTmXvI_riwu1rbN25aXU5tQri5rF0J0rYWiurE=) | Wow, Peter — How are you feeling after last night’s election? I’m incredibly happy that Democrats won across the board. I always go into Election Day with a healthy dose of skepticism, but man did it go even better than people had hoped! Not only did we win the Governor’s races in New Jersey and Virginia, but voters here in California overwhelmingly passed Prop 50. What really struck me wasn’t just that we won everywhere — it’s how much we won by. Democrats are outperforming in red and blue, rural and urban areas alike. **Yesterday proved that Democrats have a strong, diverse, big-tent coalition and when we show up to vote, we win.** We also saw that voters remain laser-focused on the top two issues: affordability and healthcare. It’s a reminder that it’s not enough just to be anti-Donald Trump — we have to clearly tell voters what Democrats will do to lower costs and protect healthcare if we take back the House next year. I’ll be honest: I’m feeling a lot more hopeful about Democrats’ chances in 2026 than I did 24 hours ago. But we can’t take anything for granted. Our country is on the line, and we have to be ready for a tough fight.
